name: Acid Splash
desc: Create an exploding 5 ft rad acidic bubble at a point w/in range, each creature in area takes 1d6 Acid dmg (Dex save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Blade Ward
desc: Whenever a creature makes an atk roll against you, they subtract 1d4 from their atk roll.

name: Booming Blade
desc: Make a melee spell atk as part of casting. On hit, target is affected. If it willingly moves 5 ft or more before end of your next turn, it takes 1d8 Thunder dmg. Dmg increases at 5th (+1d8 Thunder to initial weapon atk & secondary dmg), 11th (+2d8), & 17th (+3d8).

name: Chill Touch
desc: Melee spell atk, deals 1d10 Necrotic dmg, target can't regain HP until start of your next turn. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d10), 11th (3d10), & 17th (4d10).

name: Control Flames
desc: Affect visible nonmagical flame w/in 5 ft cube: Expand flame 5 ft in one direction (fuel needed); extinguish flame, double/halve light radius and/or change color for 1 Hr; or cause simple shapes to appear w/in flames. Multiple castings allow up to 3 non-instant effects max.

name: Create Bonfire
desc: Create magic bonfire in 5 ft cube on visible ground. Deals 1d8 Fire dmg to creatures in space when cast, or when entering bonfire's space for 1st time on a turn/ending turn in space (Dex save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Dancing Lights
desc: Create 4 lights that shine Dim Light w/in 10 ft rad, lights must be w/in 20 ft of each other, & w/in range. Alternatively, can merge 4 lights into one Medium vaguely Humanoid form that shines in a 10 ft rad. Bon Act to move lights ≤60 ft.

name: Druidcraft
desc: Predict weather (next 24 Hrs in your location), make plants bloom, create natural sensory effects in 5 ft cube (leaves, wind, smells, sounds), or light/extinguish small fires.

name: Eldritch Blast
desc: Ranged spell atk, target takes 1d10 Force dmg. Beam number increases at 5th lvl (2 beams), 11th (3 beams), & 17th (4 beams). Separate atks per beam.

name: Elementalism
desc: Pick one: 1) Beckon Air, create a breeze strong enough to ripple cloth/stir dust/rustle leaves/close unattended doors & shutters all in a 5 ft cube; 2) Beckon Earth, create thin shroud of dust/sand that covers surfaces in 5 ft area or make a single word appear in dirt/sand in your handwriting; 3) Beckon Fire, create a thin cloud of harmless embers & colored, scented smoke (of your choice) in a 5 ft cube which can light candles/torches/lamps in affected area, & smoke's scent lingers for 1 min; 4) Beckon Water, create a spray of cool mist to lightly dampen creatures/objects in 5 ft cube or create 1 cup of clean water in an open container/on a surface, which evaporates in 1 min; 5) Shape Element, cause dirt/sand/fire/smoke/mist/water that can fit in a 1 ft cube to assume a crude shape for 1 hr.

name: Encode Thoughts
desc: Pull memory/idea/message from your mind & transform it into a tangible energy string (Tiny, weightless, carriable, semisolid object that's otherwise stationary) called a thought strand which persists until spell ends. If cast while concentrating on a spell that allows thought reading/manipulation (Detect Thoughts/Modify Memory), those thoughts are usable for this spell. Casting while holding a thought strand allows you to instantly recieve thought strand's contents.

name: Fire Bolt
desc: Ranged spell atk against target in range, target takes 1d10 Fire dmg, ignites combustibles. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d10), 11th (3d10), & 17th (4d10).

name: Friends
desc: Emanate friendship at visible target w/in 10 ft. Target becomes Charmed (Wis save negates) for the duration.

name: Frostbite
desc: Visible target takes 1d6 Cold dmg & has disadv on next weapon atk before end of its next turn (Con save negates dmg & disadv). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Green Flame Blade
desc: Make a melee spell atk as part of casting. On hit, target is affected (+0d8) & creature w/in 5 ft of target takes Fire dmg equal to spellcasting ability mod. At 5th, +1d8 to initial & secondary dmg, +2d8 at 11th & +3d8 at 17th.

name: Guidance
desc: Once before duration ends, target can add +1d4 to one skill check of your choice, before or after making the check.

name: Gust
desc: Pick one: 1) Push Creature, push Medium or smaller creature (Str save negates); 2) Push Object, push 5 lb object 10 ft; or 3) Sensory Effect, harmless sensory air effect.

name: Infestation
desc: Create cloud of small parasites to appear on visible target, who takes 1d6 Poison dmg & move 5 ft in random direction (Con save negates, no oppor atks & if direction is blocked, they don't move). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Light
desc: Object sheds light in 20 ft rad, dim light in 40 ft rad. Ends if you cast it again.

name: Lightning Lure
desc: Visible target is pulled 10 ft in straight line to you, then takes 1d8 Lightning dmg if it's within 5 ft of you (Str save negates pull & dmg). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Mage Hand
desc: Spectral, floating hand appears w/in range & can immediately be used to manipulate an object/open unlocked door or container/stow or retrieve item from open container/pour vial contents out. As Magic Act on later turns, can both control the hand again & move it 30 ft. Hand can't atk/activate magic items/carry more than 10 lbs. Hand vanishes if it's ever more than 30 ft from you or if spell is cast again.

name: Magic Stone
desc: Enchant up to 3 pebbles. Anyone can hurl pebble (ranged spell atk using your spellcasting mod) up to 60 ft for 1d6 + your spellcasting mod. Pebble loses enchantment after atk.

name: Mending
desc: Repairs single break/tear in object as long as break/tear isn't larger than 1 ft in any dimension. Can't restore magic to objects.

name: Message
desc: Send message to target & receive whisper only you hear. Can cast through solid objects if familiar w/target. Magical silence/1 ft of stone/1 inch metal/any lead/3 ft wood blocks spell. Can wind around corners/openings.

name: Mind Sliver
desc: Visible target takes 1d6 Psychic dmg & subtracts 1d4 from their next save before end of your next turn (Int save negates dmg & subtraction). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th, (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Minor Illusion
desc: Create sound/image of object. Sound can range from whisper to a scream in any sound, continuing unabated for duration. Image must be w/in 5 ft cube & can't create sound/light/smell/sensory effect/physicality. Investigation check (Study Act) vs spell DC can determine illusion.

name: Mold Earth
desc: Choose one: 1) Excavate, excavate loose dirt to 5 ft away, 2) Shape, create shapes/colors/words/images in material for 1 hr, 3) Roughen/Smoothen, make difficult/normal terrain for 1 hr. Multiple castings allow only 2 non-instant effects.

name: Poison Spray
desc: Ranged spell atk, target takes 1d12 Poison dmg. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d12), 11th (3d12), & 17th (4d12).

name: Prestidigitation
desc: Create minor magical effects (lights, flames, clean/soil, warm/cool, flavor, trinket, etc). Affects 1 object (1 cubic foot). Multiple castings allow up to 3 non-instant effects.

name: Primal Savagery
desc: Teeth/nails temporarily become corrosive. Melee spell atk, target takes 1d10 Acid dmg. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d10), 11th (3d10), & 17th (4d10).

name: Produce Flame
desc: Flickering flame appears in hand as Bon Act. Shed light (20 ft bright, 20 ft dim). Can hurl flame as Act, make a ranged spell atk (ends spell) for 1d8 Fire dmg. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Ray of Frost
desc: Ranged spell atk, deals 1d8 Cold dmg & reduces target's speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Resistance
desc: Target can reduce Acid/Bludg/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Necrotic/Piercing/Poison/Radiant/Slash/Thunder dmg (your choice) by 1d4 once/turn for duration.

name: Sacred Flame
desc: Visible target takes 1d8 Radiant dmg, ignores cover (Dex save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Sapping Sting
desc: Visible target takes 1d4 Necrotic dmg & falls Prone (Con save negates dmg & Prone). Dmg increases at 5th (2d4), 11th (3d4), & 17th (4d4).

name: Shape Water
desc: Choose one: 1) Change Flow, move/change flow of water 5 ft in any direction; 2) Animate, water makes simple shapes/animation for 1 hr; 2) Change Quality, change water opacity for 1 hr; 3) Freeze, freeze unoccupied water for 1 hr. Multiple castings allow only 2 non-instant effects.

name: Shillelagh
desc: Club/staff becomes magical. Can use Spellcasting stat for atk & dmg instead of Strength. Weapon die becomes 1d8 & deals Force/usual dmg type (your choice). Spell ends if you let go of weapon. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (1d10), 11th (1d12), & 17th (2d6).

name: Shocking Grasp
desc: Melee spell atk, targets takes 1d8 Lightning dmg & can't take Reacts until start of its next turn. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Sorcerous Burst
desc: Ranged spell atk against target w/in range, target takes 1d8 Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Poison/Psychic/Thunder (your choice). If you roll an 8 on a d8 for dmg, you can roll another d8 & add it to dmg. The max number of d8's addable is equal to your spellcasting ability mod. Base dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Spare The Dying
desc: Stabilize a living target w/in 15 ft that is dying. Range increases at 5th lvl (30 ft), 11th (60 ft), & 17th (120 ft).

name: Starry Wisp
desc: Ranged spell atk against target w/in range, target takes 1d8 Radiant dmg, emits dim light (10 ft rad) & can't be Invisible (both until end of your next turn). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8), 11th (3d8), & 17th (4d8).

name: Sword Burst
desc: Each creature w/in 5 ft of you takes 1d6 Force dmg (Dex save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Thaumaturgy
desc: You manifest a minor wonder: voice booms 3 times for 1 min, cause flames to flicker, cause harmless ground tremors for 1 min, create instantaneous sound from a point of choice, cause unlock door/window to slam, alter appearance of eyes for 1 min. Cause up to 3 effects at once w/ multiple castings.

name: Thorn Whip
desc: Melee spell atk, target takes 1d6 Piercing & is pulled 10 ft closer to you (Large or smaller creatures). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Thunderclap
desc: Each creature w/in 5 ft of you takes 1d6 Thunder dmg (Con save negates). Spell's thunderous sound audible up to 100 ft away. Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Toll the Dead
desc: Visible target takes 1d8 Necrotic dmg (1d12 if below max HP, WIS save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d8/2d12), 11th (3d8/3d12), & 17th (4d8/4d12).

name: True Strike
desc: Make spell atk w/ weapon used in casting, using spellcasting ability rather than Str/Dex. Dmg type can be Radiant/usual (your choice). Does extra Radiant dmg at 5th lvl (1d6), 11th (2d6), & 17th (3d6).

name: Vicious Mockery
desc: Visible/audible target takes 1d6 Psychic dmg & has disadv on their next atk roll before end of its next turn (Wis save negates dmg & disadv). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Word of Radiance
desc: Creatures w/in 5 ft of you take 1d6 Radiant dmg (Con save negates). Dmg increases at 5th lvl (2d6), 11th (3d6), & 17th (4d6).

name: Absorb Elements
desc: When you take Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder dmg, gain Resistance to trigger & until start of your next turn. First time you hit with melee atk (until spell end), deal extra 1d6 dmg of that energy type. Upcast: +1d6 extra dmg per slot lvl.

name: Alarm
desc: Alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature touches/enters area. Can set allowed creatures and alarm type (mental ping w/in 1 mile or audible 10 secs in 60 ft). No upcast bonus.

name: Animal Friendship
desc: Beast that can see/hear you is Charmed (Wis save negates). If you or ally harms creature, spell ends. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Armor of Agathys
desc: Gain 5 Temp HP. Deal 5 Cold dmg to melee atkers while you have these Temp HP. Upcast: +5 to temp HP & dmg per slot lvl.

name: Arms of Hadar
desc: Deal 2d6 Necrotic dmg to creatures w/in 10 ft of you (Str save for 1/2). Creatures failing save lose Reacts until its next turn. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Bane
desc: Targets that failed save, must roll a d4 & subtract the number rolled from atks & saves until spell ends. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Beast Bond
desc: Form telepathic link with Beast (Int <4) w/in line of sight. Beast gains adv on atks against creatures adjacent to you that you can see. No upcast bonus.

name: Bless
desc: Targets may add +1d4 to atks & saves until spell ends. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Burning Hands
desc: 3d6 Fire dmg to creatures in cone (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d6 extra dmg per slot lvl.

name: Catapult
desc: Unattended object (1-5lb) flies 90 ft in direction you choose. If it hits something, deals 3d8 Bludgeoning dmg to both (Dex save negates & object continues flying). Upcast: +5lb object weight & +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Cause Fear
desc: Target becomes Frightened of you until spell ends (WIS save negates). May repeat save at end of its turns to end effect (Undead/Constructs immune). Upcast: +1 target (w/in 30 ft of each other) per slot lvl.

name: Ceremony
desc: Choose 1 rite - Atonement: Restore alignment (DC 20 Insight check); Bless Water: turn vial of water holy; Coming of Age: 1/life, target gets +1d4 to ability checks for 24 hrs; Dedication: 1/life, target gains +1d4 to saves for 24 hrs; Funeral Rite: target cannot become Undead for 7 days; Wedding: next 7 days, targets gain +2 AC w/in 30 ft (1/marriage). No upcast bonus.

name: Chaos Bolt
desc: Ranged spell atk, deals 2d8+1d6 dmg. Choose a d8 for dmg type: 1=Acid, 2=Cold, 3=Fire, 4=Force, 5=Lightning, 6=Poison, 7=Psychic, 8=Thunder. If you roll doubles, energy leaps to another creature you choose w/in 30 ft. Make new atk & dmg rolls. Upcast: +1d6 extra dmg per slot lvl.

name: Charm Person
desc: Charm visible Humanoid w/in range for duration or until harmed by your/your allies (Wis save negates). Targets being in combat against you save with adv. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Chromatic Orb
desc: Choose Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Poison/Thunder - make ranged spell atk. On hit, deals 3d8 dmg of that energy type. If you roll doubles, orb leaps to another creature you choose w/in 30 ft. Orb can leap once max. Upcast: +1d8 extra dmg & +1 max number of times the orb can leap per slot lvl.

name: Color Spray
desc: Creatures w/in 15 ft cone become Blind until end of your next turn (Con save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Command
desc: Visible creature w/in range obeys one of the 1-word commands (Wis save negates): Approach - Target moves toward you by shortest & most direct route, ending its turn if it reaches w/in 5 ft of you; Drop - Target drops whatever it's holding & ends its turn; Flee - Target spends its turn moving away from you by fastest means; Grovel - Target goes prone & ends its turn; Halt - Target doesn't move & takes no Act or Bon Act. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Compelled Duel
desc: Visible creature w/in range has disadv on atks vs anyone but you & can't move more than 30 ft away from you (Wis save negates). Spell ends if you atk other hostile creatures, if an ally damages/casts a harmful spell on the target, or if you end your turn more than 30 ft away from the target. No upcast bonus.

name: Comprehend Languages
desc: Understand literal meaning of any heard spoken language you hear/read written language. Takes about 1 min to read one page of text. Doesn't decode symbols/secret messsages. No upcast bonus.

name: Create or Destroy Water
desc: Create/destroy 10 gallons of water in open container, or create 30 ft cube rain or destroy 30 ft cube of fog. Upcast: +10 gallons or +5 ft cube per slot lvl.

name: Cure Wounds
desc: Target is healed 2d8 + spellcasting ability mod. Upcast: +2d8 extra healing per slot lvl.

name: Detect Evil and Good
desc: Detect Aberrations/Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead w/in 30 ft, as well as consecrated/desecrated areas. Spell is blocked by 1 ft of stone/dirt/wood, 1 inch of metal, or thin sheet of lead. No upcast bonus.

name: Detect Magic
desc: Detect presence of magical effects w/in 30 ft. Subsequent Magic Act to see auras & school of magic around creature/object. Spell is blocked by 1 ft of stone/dirt/wood, 1 inch of metal, or thin sheet of lead. No upcast bonus.

name: Detect Poison and Disease
desc: Detect presence and identity of poisons, poisonous/venomous creatures, & diseases w/in 30 ft. Poison/creature/contagion identified as well. Spell is blocked by 1 ft of stone/dirt/wood, 1 inch of metal, or thin sheet of lead. No upcast bonus.

name: Disguise Self
desc: Make yourself, including possessions, look different. Can't change your body type, so you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Doesn't trick physical inspection. Creatures can use an Study Act to use Investigation vs your spell DC. No upcast bonus.

name: Dissonant Whispers
desc: Target takes 3d6 Psychic dmg & must immediately use its React (if available) to move its full speed away from you, using the safest route (Wis save for 1/2 dmg & no fleeing) Upcast: +1d6 extra dmg per slot lvl.

name: Distort Value
desc: Ilusoinarily double/halve the perceived value of an object no more than 1 ft on a side. Anyone examining can use Study Act to make Investigation check against your spell save DC. No upcast bonus.

name: Divine Favor
desc: Weapon atks deal an extra 1d4 Radiant dmg until spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Divine Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 2d8 Radiant dmg from atk. Dmg increases by 1d8 if target is a Fiend/Undead. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Earth Tremor
desc: Each creature in area (other than you) takes 1d6 Bludgeoning dmg and is knocked prone (Dex save for no effect & no dmg). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Ensnaring Strike
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting w/ weapon
desc: Ensnare hit target, they become Restrained (Str save negates, Large+ creatures have adv on save). While restrained, target takes 1d6 Piercing dmg at start of its turns. Str check by creature or its allies to break free vs your spell save DC using an Act. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Entangle
desc: Plants turn area into difficult terrain & Restrain creatures in area (Str save negates); can use Act to make Str check against spell DC to free itself. No upcast bonus.

name: Expeditious Retreat
desc: Take Dash Act as part of casting & can Dash as Bon Act until spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Faerie Fire
desc: Outlines all in colored light that makes them glow w/ dim light for 10 ft & negates concealment/Invisibility (Dex save negates). Atks vs outlined creatures gain adv. No upcast bonus.

name: False Life
desc: Gain 2d4+4 Temp HP. Upcast: +5 additional Temp HP per slot lvl.

name: Feather Fall
desc: Creatures' descent slows to 60 ft per round; if the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling dmg and lands on its feat, & the spell ends.

name: Find Familiar
desc: Gain the service of a familiar, in Bat/Cat/Frog/Hawk/Lizard/Octopus/Owl/Rat/Raven/Spider/Weasel/Beast of CR 0. No upcast bonus.

name: Fog Cloud
desc: Area becomes heavily obscured, spreads around corners. Strong wind/Gust of Wind spell disperses. Upcast: +20 ft rad per slot lvl.

name: Frost Fingers
desc: Each creature in 15 ft cone takes 2d8 Cold dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Uncarried/unworn nonmagical liquids are frozen. Upcast: +1d8 Cold dmg per slot lvl.

name: Gift of Alacrity
desc: Target can add 1d8 to Initiative rolls. No upcast bonus.

name: Goodberry
desc: Create up to 10 magic berries, which take a Bon Act to eat. Each heal 1 hp & provide nourishment for 1 day. Uneaten berries disappear when spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Grease
desc: Grease covers 10 ft sq, it becomes difficult terrain. Creatures in area fall prone (Dex save negates). Creature that enters/ends turn must also save or fall prone. No upcast bonus.

name: Guiding Bolt
desc: Ranged spell atk, target takes 4d6 Radiant dmg, & next atk roll against target before end of your next turn has adv. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Hail of Thorns
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting w/ a ranged weapon
desc: Ranged weapon atk bursts & damages all w/in 5 ft (plus target) for 1d10 Piercing dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Healing Word
desc: Heals 2d4 + spellcasting ability mod. Upcast: +2d4 healing per slot lvl.

name: Hellish Rebuke
desc: Creature that just damaged you takes 2d10 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Heroism
desc: Target is immune to being Frightened & gains Temp HP equal to your spellcasting ability mod at start of its turns. Any remaining temp HP disappears when the spell ends. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Hex
desc: Curse target, your atks deal +1d6 Necrotic dmg. Target has disadv on ability checks of 1 type (choose stat). Can move Hex as Bon Act if target dies. Upcast: Duration increases, 2nd lvl (4 Hrs), 3rd/4th lvl (8 Hrs), 5th+ lvl (24 Hrs).

name: Hunter's Mark
desc: Your atks deal +1d6 Force dmg to target. Adv on any Perception/Survival check to find target. Can move Mark as Bon Act if target dies. Upcast: Duration increases, 3rd/4th lvl (8 Hrs) 5th+ lvl (24 Hrs).

name: Ice Knife
desc: Ranged spell atk, dealing 1d10 Piercing dmg. Hit or miss, shard explodes (5 ft rad, 2d6 Cold dmg, Dex save for no dmg). Upcast: +1d6 cold dmg per slot lvl.

name: Identify
desc: Learn properties, charges, magic item uses, and/or spells affecting a creature or object. No upcast bonus.

name: Illusory Script
desc: You & any designated creatures see the writing normally; everyone else sees unintelligible script. If dispelled, original script disappears. Truesight bypasses. No upcast bonus.

name: Inflict Wounds
desc: Deals 2d10 Necrotic dmg (Con save negates). Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Jim's Magic Missile
desc: Ranged spell atk for each missile, dealing 2d4 Force dmg per missile. On crit, deals 5d4 Force dmg. On nat 1, all missiles instead hit you for 1 Force dmg each. Upcast: +1 dart created per slot lvl.

name: Jump
desc: Target can jump up to 30 ft by spending 10 ft of movement. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Longstrider
desc: Target's Speed increases by 10 ft. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Mage Armor
desc: Target's AC becomes 13+Dex. Ends if armor is worn. No upcast bonus.

name: Magic Missile
desc: Each dart auto-hits & deals 1d4+1 Force dmg. Upcast: +1 dart per slot lvl.

name: Magnify Gravity
desc: Gravity in a 10 ft rad sphere increases, each creature takes 2d8 Force dmg & its speed is halved (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no speed reduction. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Protection from Evil and Good
desc: Aberrations/Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead (your choice) have disadv on atks vs target. Target can't be Charmed/Frightened/Possessed by them, & gains adv on new saving throws if already affected. No upcast bonus.

name: Purify Food and Drink
desc: Renders food & drink in 5 ft rad sphere free of poison, disease, & rot. No upcast bonus.

name: Ray of Sickness
desc: Ranged spell atk, target takes 2d8 Poison dmg & becomes Poisoned until end of your next turn. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Sanctuary
desc: Creatures atking target must make Wis save or choose new target. Ends if target makes atk/casts a spell/deals dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Searing Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes an extra 1d6 Fire dmg & ignites target. At start of each of its turns until the spell ends, target takes 1d6 Fire dmg (Con save negates, & spell ends). Upcast: +1d6 dmg on initial hit per slot lvl.

name: Shield
desc: When targeted by atk/Magic Missile spell, until start of next turn, gain +5 bonus to AC, including against triggering atk. Immune to Magic Missile. No upcast bonus.

name: Shield of Faith
desc: Gain +2 bonus to AC for duration. No upcast bonus.

name: Silent Image
desc: Create silent image of an object/creature/phenomenon for duration. Act to move, & may make movement seem natural. Physical interation reveals it to be an illusion, creature can make Investigation check vs spell save DC. No upcast bonus.

name: Silvery Barbs
desc: When a creature w/in range succeeds on an atk/check/save, you force them to reroll & take the lower roll. Then give another creature w/in range adv on next atk/check/save w/in 1 min.

name: Sleep
desc: Each creature w/in area becomes Incapacitated until end of its next turn(first Wis save negates), then become Unconscious until spell ends (second Wis save negates). Spell ends if target takes dmg/someone takes an Act to wake target. Creatures that don't sleep/are immune to Exhaustion auto succeed on saves. No upcast bonus.

name: Snare
desc: Area becomes Invisible trap (Investigation check vs spell DC to spot). Triggers on Large or smaller creature, hoisting them into the air, hanging 3' from ground & restraining them until spell end (Dex save negates). Save at end of its turn to break free, or have ally help w/ Act (Arcana check vs DC) to end spell. No upcast bonus.

name: Speak with Animals
desc: Comprehend & communicate with Beasts. Limited by Intelligence. Doesn't Charm. No upcast bonus.

name: Spellfire Flare
desc: Ranged spell atk, ignoring Half & Three-Quarters Cover, dealing 2d10 Radiant dmg on hit. Upcast: +1 blast per slot lvl, roll separate atks for each.

name: Tasha's Caustic Brew
desc: Creatures in line are covered in acid for duration, taking 2d4 Acid dmg at start of their turns (Initial Dex save negates, later Act negates). Upcast: +2d4 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Tasha's Hideous Laughter
desc: Creature falls prone laughing & is Incapacitated (Wis save negates). At end of turn & each time it takes dmg, gets another save to shake. Adv to save if triggered by dmg. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Tenser's Floating Disk
desc: Create a hovering 3' disk of force, which can carry 500 lbs of weight & follows you (20 ft). No upcast bonus.

name: Thunderous Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 2d6 Thunder dmg from atk, is pushed 10 ft away, & knocked prone (Str save negates push & prone). Makes an audible noise up w/in 300 ft of you. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Thunderwave
desc: Creatures in area that take 2d8 Thunder dmg & are pushed 10 ft away from you (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no push). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Unseen Servant
desc: Creates Invisible, mindless, shapeless force (AC 10, 1 HP, Str 2, no atks). Bon Act: command it to move 15 ft & interact with objects. Dispells if moves out of range. No upcast bonus.

name: Wardaway
desc: Target makes a Con save (Constructs & Undead auto-succeed), or: takes 2d4 Force dmg, halves it Speed until start of your next turn, and on its next turn it can only take an Act OR Bon Act. Half dmg & no other effects on success. Upcast: +2d4 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Witch Bolt
desc: Ranged spell atk, dealing 2d12 Lightning dmg & on each of your turns, can use Bon Act to auto deal 1d12 dmg. Ends if target exceeds range, or target has total cover. Upcast: +1d12 initial dmg per slot lvl.

name: Wrathful Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 1d6 Psychic dmg & becomes Frightened (Wis save negates, repeated each turn). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Zephyr Strike
desc: Your movement doesn't provoke oppor atks. Once before spell ends, give yourself adv on one atk roll on your turn, dealing +1d8 Force dmg & +30 ft Speed until end of your turn.

name: Aganazzar's Scorcher
desc: Line flame emanates from you, dealing 3d8 Fire dmg to creatures (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Aid
desc: Gain 5 max & current HP. Upcast: +5 HP per slot lvl.

name: Air Bubble
desc: Create a globe filled w/ fresh air around the head of a target w/in range. Upcast: +2 globes per slot lvl.

name: Alter Self
desc: Assume a new form: Aquatic Adaptation--breathe water, Swim Speed is Walking Speed. Changed appearance--change features up to looking like different race of same size. Natural Weapons--Choose claws, fangs, etc. Unarmed strike deals d6 dmg & you're proficient. Weapon is +1 & magic. No upcast bonus.

name: Animal Messenger
desc: Target Beast travels for spell duration toward a specified location & creature described. 50 miles per 24 hrs for a flying messenger, or 25 miles for other animals. If it makes it to the described, it delivers a message up to 25 words in your voice. Upcast: +48 hr duration per slot lvl.

name: Arcane Lock
desc: Object is locked to everyone but creatures you specify. May specify spoken password, which supresses lock for 1 min. Lock cannot be opened by nonmagical means. No upcast bonus.

name: Arcane Vigor
desc: Roll 1 or 2 unexpended Hit Die & regain HP equal to total roll's total plus spellcasting ability mod. Those Hit Die are then expended. Upcast: +1 Hit Die expendable per slot lvl.

name: Augury
desc: Portents Weal/Woe of action taken in next 30 mins. Doesn't account for circumstances (like other spells) that may change results. Subsequent casting has a cumulative 25% change for random reading. No upcast bonus.

name: Barkskin
desc: Target's skin turns bark-like, their AC can't be less than 17. No upcast bonus.

name: Beast Sense
desc: Touch willing Beast. See through Beast's eyes & ears, including special senses. No upcast bonus.

name: Blindness/Deafness
desc: Visible target is Blinded/Deafened (choose, Con save negates). Target makes a Con save at the end of each turn to end the spell. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Blur
desc: Creatures have disadv on atk rolls against you. Atker immune if it doesn't rely on sight (Blindsight) or can see through illusions (Truesight). No upcast bonus.

name: Borrowed Knowledge
desc: Gain Proficiency in 1 skill for duration. Ends early if cast again. No upcast bonus.

name: Branding Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting w/ weapon
desc: Target takes extra 2d6 Radiant dmg, stops being Invisible, sheds dim light in a 5 ft rad, & can't become Invisible until spell ends. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Calm Emotions
desc: Each Humanoid in area; can suppress Charm or Fright, or make a target indifferent from being hostile unless it or its friends are harmed (Cha save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Cloud of Daggers
desc: Creatures take 4d4 Slashing dmg when entering the area/starting its turn there. Only takes dmg once per turn. Upcast: +2d4 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Continual Flame
desc: Create a flame as bright as a torch on target object, shedding bright light for 20 ft & dim for another 20 ft. It creates no heat & uses no oxygen. No upcast bonus.

name: Cordon of Arrows
desc: Plant arrows/bolts into ground. When another creature approaches w/in 30 ft for first time on turn (or ends turn there), 1 ammo shoots it, taking 2d4 Piercing dmg (Dex save negates dmg, destroys ammo). Can specify creatures to ignore. Upcast: +2 ammo per slot lvl.

name: Crown of Madness
desc: Target is Charmed (Wis save negates); twisted crown of jagged iron appears on its head. Target must make a melee atk vs a creature other than itself (you choose) before moving. It can act normally if none are in range. You must use your Act to maintain control over the target or the spell ends. Target gets a Wis save at the end of each turn to end the spell. No upcast bonus.

name: Darkness
desc: Darkness radiates, blocks light & vision. Can be covered if cast on object. Dispels lvl 2 or lower lights. No upcast bonus.

name: Darkvision
desc: Target gains Darkvision of 150 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Death Armor
desc: Target gains Adv on Death Saves & once/turn when a creature w/in 5 ft hits the target, the atker takes 2d4 Necrotic dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Deryan's Helpful Homunculi
desc: Summon a group of helpful spirits, appearing as homunculi/another Construct of your choice. They're Intangible & Invulnerable, and considered to be proficient in Arcana & a set of Artisan's Tools used in the spell's casting. When crafting, these spirits function as a single assistant (halving crafting time). No upcast bonus.

name: Detect Thoughts
desc: Learn surface thoughts/detect presence of creatures that know languages. Can probe deeper as Magic Act (Wis save negates); if target fails, gain insight into reasoning, emotional state, & something that looms large in its mind. Creature can use act on its turn to make Arcana check vs your Arcana check; if it succeeds, the spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Dragon's Breath
desc: Touched target gains breath atk (Act) in 15 ft cone for 3d6 dmg (Choose Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Poison, Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Dust Devil
desc: Elemental appears in space. Creature ending turn adjacent to devil takes 1d8 Bludgeoning dmg & is pushed 10 ft away (Str save for 1/2 dmg & no push). Bon Act to move devil 30 ft. Blows around sand/gravel/loose dirt into 10 ft rad cloud around it (heavily obscured). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Earthbind
desc: Target's Fly Speed becomes 0 ft (Str save negates). Airborne creatures descend 60 ft per round (not falling). No upcast bonus.

name: Elminster's Elusion
desc: Gain Adv on saves against spells & magical effects. Also, if you succeed a save against a spell/magical effect that allows you to take half dmg, you instead take no dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Enhance Ability
desc: Choose Str/Dex/Int/Wis/Cha, target gains adv on checks using that ability. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Enlarge/Reduce
desc: Target grows/shrinks (Con save negates). Object cannot be carried. If target is creature, everything wearing/carrying also affected. Items revert to normal size when dropped. Enlarge: double all dimensions, 8x weight, increase one size category, adv. on Str checks & saves, weapons & unarmed +1d4 dmg. Reduce: halve all dimensions, 1/8x weight, disadv on Str checks & saves, weapons & unarmed -d4 dmg (min. 1 dmg on atks). No upcast bonus.

name: Enthrall
desc: Targets have -10 on Perception checks & to their Passive Perception (Wis save negates). You & allies auto-succeed on save. No upcast bonus.

name: Find Steed
desc: Summon a spirit steed using Otherworldly Steed stat block that's Celestial/Fey Fiend (you choose form & type). Steed is an ally, shares your Initiative, acting independently to protect you if you're Incapacitated. Upcast: Noted on stat block per slot lvl.

name: Find Traps
desc: Sense the presence of any trap in range (including Alarm/Glyph of Warding & such), but not the location. No upcast bonus.

name: Flame Blade
desc: Summon fiery scimitar for duration. Melee spell atk for 3d6 + spellcasting ability mod Fire dmg, sheds light (bright 10 ft, dim 20 ft). Can reconjure as Bon Act if you let go of it. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Flaming Sphere
desc: Creatures adjacent to sphere at end of their turn take 2d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Move sphere 30 ft as Bon Act. Creatures hit by sphere take dmg (Dex save for 1/2). Sheds light 20 ft rad. Ignites combustibles. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Flock of Familiars
desc: Summon 3 animal spirits, using same rules as Find Familiar (Celestial/Fey/Fiend type, can telepathically communicate w/ 1 mile. When cast w/ touch, one of the summoned familiars can deliver spell as normal once per turn. Upcast: +1 familiar conjured per slot lvl.

name: Fortune's Favor
desc: Impart luck to target w/in range. Target can dismiss spell on atk/check/save to roll additional d20 & choose which to use. If original roll had adv/disadv, additional d20 is rolled after that's been applied. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Gentle Repose
desc: Target is protected from decay, can't become Undead, & the timer for reviving spells are extended for duration. No upcast bonus.

name: Gift of Gab
castingTime: React, when speaking to another creature
desc: Each creature of your choice w/in range forgets everything you said w/in the last 6 seconds. They then remember that you actually said the words you speak as the Verbal component of the spell. No upcast bonus.

name: Gust of Wind
desc: 60 ft line, 10 ft wide wind blasts from you for duration. Creatures starting turn in area are pushed 15 ft (Str save negates). Movement against wind uses 2x movement. Disperses gasses, extinguishes fires. Bon Act: change line direction. No upcast bonus.

name: Healing Spirit
desc: Conjure intangible spirit in 5 ft cube. When you/visible creature enters space for 1st time on turn/starts its turn there, can cause spirit to heal 1d6 HP to them (no act). Can't heal Constructs/Undead. Bon Act: move spirit up to 30 ft w/in sight. Upcast: +1d6 healing per slot lvl.

name: Heat Metal
desc: Creatures in physical contact w/ object take 2d8 Fire dmg; may use a Bon Act on later turns to cause dmg again. If the creature is holding the object, it must drop it (Con save negates). If it doesn't drop the object, it has disadv on atk rolls & checks until the start of your next turn. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Hold Person
desc: Target becomes Paralyzed (Wis save negates). Make another save at end of each turn. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Homunculus Servant
desc: Summon a special homunculus in an unoccupied space w/in range, using the Homunculus Servant stat block. Any existing servants from this spell are replaced. Servant's appearance is completely by choice. The homunculus is an ally to you & your allies in combat, sharing your Initiative & taking its turn immediately after yours. Obeys commands (no Act needed) & takes Dodge Act if given no commands. Upcast: bonuses as noted on stat block.

name: Immovable Object
desc: Magically fix object that weighs no more than 10 lbs in place. You & designated creatures can move object normally. Can set password to suppress spell for 1 min. Fixed object can hold up to 4000 lbs. Creatures can use Act to make Str check against your spell save DC to move object 10 ft. Upcast: 4th/5th lvl (DC increases by 5, carries up to 8000 lbs, lasts 24 Hrs), 6th+ (DC increases by 10, carries up to 20000 lbs, lasts until dispelled).

name: Invisibility
desc: Target & their possesions become Invisible. Ends if target atks/casts a spell/deals dmg. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Jim's Glowing Coin
desc: Hurl coin (spell's Material component) to spot w/in range, which lights up as if under Light spell. Creatures of your choice w/in 30 ft of coin are distracted for duration (Wis save negates), having disadv on Perception checks & Initiative. No upcast bonus.

name: Kinetic Jaunt
desc: Empower self; Speed increases by 10 ft, don't provoke oppor atks, can move through hostile creatures (not difficult terrain, but take 1d8 Force dmg if end turn in their space). No upcast bonus.

name: Knock
desc: Target becomes unlocked/unstuck/unbarred. Only 1 lock is affected. Arcane locks suppressed for 10 min. Loud knock sound audible w/in 300 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Lesser Restoration
desc: Cures 1 disease/condition (Blind/Deaf/Paralyzed/Poison). No upcast bonus.

name: Levitate
desc: Target up to 500 lbs rises vertically ≤20 ft (Con save negates). Change target's altitude by 20 ft on your turn (Act) or target can move up/down as part of movement. Target floats down at spell end. No upcast bonus.

name: Locate Animals or Plants
desc: You learn the direction and distance to the closest specific Beast/Plant creature/nonmagical plant w/in 5 miles, if any are present. No upcast bonus.

name: Locate Object
desc: Sense the direction to a familiar object's location w/in range. Can't locate through any lead.

name: Magic Mouth
desc: Implant message on object (≤25 words), set visual/audio trigger. When trigger happens w/in 30 ft, mouth appears & speaks in your voice/volume. Can dispel/reset itself after delivery. No upcast bonus.

name: Magic Weapon
desc: Weapon becomes magical (+1 bonus to atk & dmg rolls). Upcast: 3rd-5th (+2), 6th+ (+3).

name: Maximilian’s Earthen Grasp
desc: Hand reaches out from empty 5 ft sq of earth. Grabs at adjacent creature, Restrains & deals 2d6 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save negates). On target's turn, can use Act to make Str check against your spell save DC to break out. You can use Act to crush creature for 2d6 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save for 1/2 dmg). Act to move hand in range to atk another (releases current target). No upcast bonus.

name: Melf's Acid Arrow
desc: Ranged spell atk; deals 4d4 Acid dmg & 2d4 Acid dmg at end of its next turn. On miss, splashes for 1/2 initial dmg. Upcast, +1d4 dmg to initial & secondary per slot lvl.

name: Mind Spike
desc: Target takes 3d8 Psychic dmg, you know target's location until spell ends while on same plane, target can't be Invisible/hidden from you (WIS save for 1/2 dmg & no tracking). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Mirror Image
desc: Create 3 duplicates of yourself. When targeted by atk roll, roll a d6 for each remaining duplicate. On 3+, a duplicate is hit by the atk instead & destroyed. Duplicates ignore all other dmg. Creatures w/ Blinded/Blindsight/Truesight unaffected. No upcast bonus.

name: Misty Step
desc: Teleport up to 30 ft to visible unnocupied space. No upcast bonus.

name: Moonbeam
desc: 5 ft rad, 40 ft high cylinder, provides dim light. Creatures entering/starting turn in area take 2d10 Radiant dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Shapechangers/shapechanged creatures have disadv on save & revert to original form on fail. May use Act to move it 60 ft. Upcast: +1d10 per slot lvl.

name: Nathair's Mischief
desc: Roll on Mischievous Surge table (& again at start of each of your turns, effect fills cube until start of your next turn, & can move cube 10 ft before rolling. Mischievous Surges (d4): 1) Apple Pie Smell, all creatures in area becomes Charmed by you (Wis save negates); 2) Bouquets of Flowers, Blind all creatures in area (Dex save negates); 3) Giggling, all creatures in area become Incapacitated & move in random direction (Wis save negates); 4) Molasses, cube becomes difficult terrain. No upcast bonus.

name: Nystul's Magic Aura
desc: Target creatures gains Mask - change how target appears to spells/effects that detect creature types, which now treat target as if it were that type/alignment. Target object gains False Aura - create/hide magical aura, & change it to appear as school you choose. No upcast bonus.

name: Pass Without Trace
desc: Creatures you choose in aura get +10 to Stealth checks & leave no tracks. No upcast bonus.

name: Phantasmal Force
desc: Create phantasm in mind of target no larger than 10 ft cube (Int save negates). Target can use Act for Investigation check against your spell DC to disbelieve. Target treats phantasm as real, suffers 2d8 Psychic dmg if w/in 5 ft of damaging phantasm or w/in damaing phantasm's area. Target perceives dmg as appropriate type to the illusion. No upcast bonus.

name: Prayer of Healing
desc: Heals 2d8 + spellcasting ability mod. Upcast: +1d8 healing per slot lvl.

name: Protection from Poison
desc: End Poisoned condition on target. Target gains adv on saves vs poison, & Resistance to Poison dmg for duration. No upcast bonus.

name: Pyrotechnics
desc: Can extinguish nearby nonmagical fire (5 ft cube). Choose 1 effect: 1) Fireworks, the fire explodes, Blinding all creatures w/in 10 ft (Con save negates). 2) Smoke, spreads in 20 ft rad (heavy obscurement) that lasts for 1 min/until strong wind disperses. No upcast bonus.

name: Ray of Enfeeblement
desc: Target creature has disadv on Str-based atks/checks/saves for duration & subtracts 1d8 from dmg rolls (Con save at end of each of its turns, on success target has disadv on next atk roll). No upcast bonus.

name: Rime's Binding Ice
desc: Creatures in area take 3d8 Cold dmg & have Speed reduced to 0 ft for 1 min (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no movement reduction). Affected creatures/others can take Act to break ice. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Rope Trick
desc: Rope is enchanted to lead to 3' x 5 ft portal to extradimensional space, can hold up to 8 Medium or smaller creatures. Rope can be pulled into space to disappear. Atks can't cross in/out of space. Those inside can see down. Everything falls down when spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Scorching Ray
desc: Fire 3 rays; ranged spell atk each, dealing 2d6 Fire dmg. Upcast: +1 ray per slot lvl.

name: See Invisibility
desc: You see Invisible things as if they were visible, & can see into the Ethereal Plane. Ethereal creatures/objects appear ghostly. No upcast bonus.

name: Shadow Blade
desc: Create shadow blade in your hand (Simple melee weapon, Light, Finesse, Thrown 20 ft/60 ft, deals 2d8 Psychic dmg). When you atk target in dim light/darkness, adv to hit. If drop weapon, it vanishes & can be conjured back w/ a Bon Act. Upcast: 3th/4th (3d8), 5th/6th (4d8), 7+ (5d8).

name: Shatter
desc: Deals 3d8 Thunder dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Constructs have disadv on save. Damages unattended nonmagical objects. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Shining Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target hit by the triggering strike takes 2d6 Radiant dmg extra, sheds Bright Light in a 5 ft radius, cannot benefit from Invisibility condition, & atk rolls against the target have Adv. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Silence
desc: No sound can be created in or pass through area for duration. Creatures inside cannot cast spells w/ Verbal components, & gain Immunity to Thunder dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Skywrite
desc: Create up to 10 cloud words in sky. No upcast bonus.

name: Snilloc’s Snowball Swarm
desc: Deals 3d6 Cold dmg in 5 ft rad sphere (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Spider Climb
desc: Target gains Climb Speed equal to Walking Speed & may move vertically & upside-down while hands are free. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Spike Growth
desc: Ground in area becomes difficult terrain. Creatures moving into or w/in area take 2d4 Piercing dmg per 5 ft moved. Ground looks natural; Perception checks vs spell DC to detect before entering. No upcast bonus.

name: Spiritual Weapon
desc: Create floating weapon. When cast, make melee spell atk vs creature w/in 5 ft of weapon. On hit, target takes 1d8 + spellcasting mod Force dmg. Bon Act: Move up to 20 ft, & make an atk. Upcast: +1d8 per slot lvl.

name: Spray of Cards
desc: Creatures in area take 2d10 Force dmg & are Blinded until end of its next turn (Dex save for 1/2 dmg & no blind). Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Suggestion
desc: You suggest a non-harmful act (≤25 words), target becomes Charmed, & pursues the described act to the best of its ability for the duration (Wis save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Summon Beast
desc: Call forth bestial spirit in visible unoccupied space, using Bestial Spirit stat block (choose Air/Land/Water, spirit resembles animal from that region). Creature is ally to you & shared Initiative w/ you but takes it's turn after you. Obeys verbal commands (no Act), & w/out any verbal commands it Dodges & avoids danger. Upcast: Noted on stat block per slot lvl.

name: Tasha's Mind Whip
desc: Target takes 3d6 Psychic dmg, can't take Reacts until end of its next turn, & must choose to move/Act/Bon Act on its next turn (Int save for 1/2 dmg & no other effects). Upcast: +1 creature w/in 30 ft of 1st target per slot lvl.

name: Vortex Warp
desc: Teleport creature to visible unoccupied space w/in range on a surface/supporting liquid (Con save negates). Upcast: +30 ft per slot lvl.

name: Warding Bond
desc: While the target is w/in 60 ft of you it gains +1 AC & saves, & Resistance to all dmg. You take the same amount of dmg it takes. Spell ends if you drop to 0 HP, if you're ever more than 60 ft from target, or if spell is recast on either connected creatures. No upcast bonus.

name: Warding Wind
desc: Strong wind surrounds you. Deafens you & others, extinguishes small fires, difficult terrain to others, ranged weapons in & out have disadv, blocks/disperses vapor, gas, & fog. No upcast bonus.

name: Warp Sense
desc: Sense active/inactive portals w/in range. Upon detecting a portal, can Study Act (DC 15) using spellcasting ability. On success, learn destination plane of portal & if/what key it requires. On fail, learn nothing & can't study portal again until spell is recast. Spell is blocked by 1 ft stone/1 inch metal/thin sheet of lead/3 ft wood or dirt. No upcast bonus.

name: Web
desc: Create webs that become difficult terrain & lightly obscure area. Spell ends after 1 round if the webs aren't anchored to 2 solid masses. Restrains creatures that enter/start the turn in area (Dex save negates). Restrained creatures can take Act to make Athletics check against your spell save DC, ending effect on success. Any 5 ft cube of web exposed to fire burns away in 1 round, dealing 2d4 Fire dmg to creatures starting their turn in fire. No upcast bonus.

name: Wither and Bloom
desc: Each creature of your choice w/in rad takes 2d6 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg), & one creature of your choice w/in rad can spend & roll an unspent Hit Die & heal equal to the rolled Hit Die + your spellcasting ability mod. Upcast: +1d6 dmg & +1 max expendable Hit Die per slot lvl.

name: Wristpocket
desc: Shunt held object weighing less than 5 lbs into extradimensional space. Until spell end, can use Act to summon object to free hand & vice versa. Object reappears at your feet when spell ends if still in pocket plane. No upcast bonus.

name: Zone of Truth
desc: Create a zone. Creatures entering/starting their turn in the zone are unable to speak a deliberate lie (Cha save negates). You know whether the creature succeeds/fails its save. Spell doesn't compel them to speak. No upcast bonus.

name: Animate Dead
desc: Create an undead servant (Small/Medium, Skeleton/Zombie). Bon Act to mentally command all creatures you made w/in 60 ft of you w/in 24 hrs of creation. Must recast spell to retain control each day. Reasserts control over ≤4 of your animated creatures. Upcast: +2 undead animated/reasserted per slot lvl.

name: Antagonize
desc: Target takes 4d4 Psychic dmg & uses its React (if available) to melee atk another visible creature of your choice. If no target is w/in range, original target has disadv on next atk roll before start of your next turn (Wis save for 1/2 dmg & no other effect). Upcast: +1d4 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Ashardalon's Stride
desc: Increase your Speed by 20 ft & you don't provoke oppor atks. When moving w/in 5 ft of a creature or unworn/uncarried object, it takes 1d6 Fire dmg (only once/turn). Upcast: +5 ft Speed & +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Aura of Vitality
desc: Can use a Bon Act to cause one creature w/in aura to regain 2d6 HP. Aura moves with you. No upcast bonus.

name: Beacon Of Hope
desc: Targets gain adv on Wisdom & Death saves, & receive maximum HP possible from any healing. No ucpast bonus.

name: Bestow Curse
desc: Choose one: 1) Checks, target has disadv on ability checks & saves w/ one ability score; 2) Atks, target has disadv on atks vs you; 3) Dodging, target must make a Wis save at start of turn, if it fails it spends its Act doing Dodging; 4) Extra Dmg, your atks/spells deal +1d8 Necrotic dmg to target. Upcast: 4th lvl (Conc, 10 min), 5th-8th (No conc, 24 hrs), 9th (No conc, until dispelled).

name: Blinding Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 3d8 Radiant dmg from atk & is Blinded until spell ends (Con save negates blind). Target makes another saving throw at the end of each of its turns to remove Blindness. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Blink
desc: At end of your turn, roll d6. On 4-6, you become Ethereal. At start of next turn, you return to empty space w/in 10 ft of where you vanished. Can dismiss spell as Act. While Ethereal, you can see 60 ft in shades of grey into Prime Material. Can ony affect/be affected by Ethereal creatures. No upcast bonus.

name: Cacophonic Shield
desc: Conjure 10 ft Emanation from you, moving w/ you. Whenever the Emanation enters a creature's space & whenever a creature enters the Emanation/ends its turn there, they must make a Con save or take 3d6 Thunder dmg & be Deafened until start of your turn (half dmg on success). Creatures make this save only once/turn. Can designate unaffected creatures when casting. Additionally, you gain Resistance to Thunder dmg & ranged atks against you have Disadv. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Call Lightning
area: 60 ft rad x 10 ft tall cylinder
desc: Storm cloud appears w/in range. As part of casting, choose a point. Creatures w/in 5 ft of point take 3d10 Lightning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Use Act each turn to call lightning again. In stormy weather, +1d10 dmg. Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Catnap
desc: Targets fall Unconscious for duration. Ends early if target takes dmg/is awakened (Act). If target sleeps full duration, gainst benefit of Short Rest. Can't benefit again until after Long Rest. No upcast bonus.

name: Clairvoyance
desc: Create an intangible, Invisible, & invulnerable sensor w/in range & choose hearing/seeing. You hear/see at a location familiar to you at the sensor location. Bon Act to switch between hearing & seeing. Creatures w/ Truesight/See Invisibility can see sensor as fist-size luminous orb. No upcast bonus.

name: Conjure Animals
desc: Conjure nature spirits into empty spaces, appearing as a Large pack of spectral, intangible animals for duration. You gain adv on Str saves while w/in 5 ft of the pack & the pack can move as part of your movement up to 30 ft to unoccupied space. When a creature enters/ends it turn w/in 10 ft of the pack, can force them to take 3d10 Slashing dmg (Dex save negates). Dmg only once/turn. Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Barrage
desc: Throw a nonmagical weapon/ammunition, dealing 5d8 Force dmg to all in cone (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Constructs
desc: Conjure a group of Intangible spirits that appear as a Medium group of Modrons/other Constructs in a visible unoccupied space. Upon casting and as a Magic Act on subsequent turns, can command spirits to target 1 visible creature/object w/in 5 ft of the spirits & create one effect of the following: 1) Clockwork Force; target must make a Dex save or take 3d6 Force dmg (half dmg on success). 2) Orderly Ward; target gains 1d6 + your spellcasting modifier Temp HP. When you move on your turn, can also command the spirits to move 30 ft to a visible unoccupied space. Upcast: +1d6 dmg & Temp HP per slot lvl.

name: Counterspell
area: 1 spell being cast w/ VSM components
desc: Caster's spell dissipates w/ no effect, wasting Act/Bon Act/React used to cast but not expending used spell slot (Con save negates dissipation & wasted Act/Bon Act/React). No upcast bonus.

name: Create Food and Water
desc: Create 45 lbs of food & 30 gallons of water on the ground/in containers w/in range. Food spoils in 24 hrs if uneaten. No upcast bonus.

name: Crusader's Mantle
desc: You & allies in aura deal extra 1d4 Radiant dmg with weapon/unarmed atks. Aura moves with you. No upcast bonus.

name: Daylight
desc: Create a sphere of sunlight, shedding bright light for 60 ft & dim light for another 60 ft, can be cast on object/point w/in range. Dispels magical darkness of 3rd lvl or lower. No upcast bonus.

name: Dispel Magic
desc: Auto-ends spells of lvl 1-3. Higher lvl spells (4+) require spellcasting ability check, w/ a DC 10 + spell lvl. Upcast: raises spell lvl of auto-dispel.

name: Elemental Weapon
desc: Weapon gains +1 bonus to atk & deals an extra 1d4 elemental dmg of chosen type (Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder). Upcast: 5th/6th (+2 to atk, 2d4 elemental dmg), 7th+ (+3 to atk, 3d4 elemental dmg).

name: Enemies Abound
desc: Target sees all creatures as enemy. Each time takes dmg, repeat save to end (Int save negates). Must choose enemy targets at random. Makes all oppor atks available to it. Immune to Fear = auto-success. No upcast bonus.

name: Erupting Earth
desc: Cube centered on point becomes difficult terrain. Each 5 ft portion takes 1 min to clear by hand. Creatures in initial cube take 3d12 Bludgeoning dmg (DEX save for 1/2). Upcast: +1d12 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Fast Friends
desc: Target becomes Charmed (Wis save negates). It undertakes services/activities asked in a friendly manner to best of its ability. If harmful/conflicting task asked, target makes another Wis save to end spell (adv if in combat). Target knows it was Charmed by you after spell ends. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Fear
desc: Creatures become Frightened & drop whatever it is holding (Wis save negates). They Dash away; if it ends its turn you & are not visible, they make a Wis save to end the effect. No upcast bonus.

name: Feign Death
desc: Target appears dead to all outward inspection & spells, is Blind & Incapacitated, Speed becomes 0 ft, gains Resistance to all but Psychic dmg, gains Immunity to Poisoned & disease/poison are suppressed. No upcast bonus.

name: Fireball
desc: Creatures take 8d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Ignites combustibles. Upcast: +1d6 per slot lvl.

name: Flame Arrows
desc: When target is hit with enchanted ammo, takes +1d6 Fire dmg. Enchantment works for 1 use per ammo. Upcast: +2 ammo per slot lvl.

name: Fly
desc: Target gains Fly Speed of 60 ft. Upcast: +1 creature per slot lvl.

name: Freedom of the Waves
area: 15 ft rad x 10 ft tall cylinder
desc: Conjure seawater deluge w/in range. Creatures in area take 2d8 Bludgeoning dmg & fall prone (Str save negates). Can designate a number of creatures equal to your spellcasting ability mod (min of 1) to auto-succeed. If you're in spell's area, as part of casting, you can teleport to visible unoccupied space w/in spell's area. No upcast bonus.

name: Galder's Tower
desc: Conjure 2-story tower of wood/stone/sturdy material. Each lvl is 10 ft tall & up to 100 ft sq. Access between is ladder & hatch. Each lvl is of the form: bedroom, study, dining space, lounge, washroom, observatory, or empty room. Tower interior is warm & dry regardless of outside conditions. Anything taken out of tower disappears, anything/anyone inside when spell ends is safely depositied outside. Can cast spell again while active to maintain same tower for another 24 hrs. Can create a permanent tower by casting spell in same location & same configuration everyday for 1 year. Upcast: +1 story per slot lvl.

name: Gaseous Form
desc: Target shapeshifts into misty cloud w/ only Fly Speed of 10 ft, can hover, can occupy space of other creature, gains Resistance to Bludgeoning/Slashing/Piercing dmg, is Immune to Prone condition, gains adv on Str/Dex/Con saves, & can pass through narrow openings. Target can't talk or manipulate objects. Form drops if target drops to 0 HP or if it takes a Magic Act to end spell. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Glyph of Warding
desc: Create a glyph & choose a trigger Act: 1) Explosive Rune, 20 ft rad sphere, 5d8 elemental dmg of your choice (Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder); 2) Spell Glyph, store a prepped spell of 3rd lvl or lower, it goes off when triggered. Upcast: +1d8 dmg or +1 spell lvl per slot lvl.

name: Haste
desc: Target gains 2x Speed, +2 AC, adv on Dex saves, +1 Act/turn (only used for atk/Dash/Disengage/Hide/Use Object). After duration, target can't move/take Acts for 1 turn. No upcast bonus.

name: Hunger of Hadar
desc: A 20 ft rad void appears. It's filled with whispers & slurping that can be heard up to 30 ft away. No light can illuminate area, & creatures fully in it are Blinded. The void's area is difficult terrain. Creature starting turn in area take 2d6 Cold dmg. Ending turn takes 2d6 Acid dmg (DEX save negates). Upcast: +1d6 Cold or Acid dmg (your choice) per slot lvl.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
desc: Each creature in area is Charmed (Wis save negates). While Charmed, targets are Incapacitated & have a Speed of 0 ft. The spell ends if it takes any dmg or if someone else uses Act to shake the creature out of its stupor. No upcast bonus.

name: Incite Greed
desc: Present gem used in casting & choose any number of creatures w/in range that can see you. Each target is Charmed by you (Wis save negates) until spell ends or you/allies does anything harmful to it. While Charmed like this, they only approach you in a safe manner. While charmed & w/in 5 ft of you, targets can't move or take Acts. Targets make Wis saves at end of each turn. No upcast bonus.

name: Intellect Fortress
desc: Visible target gains Resistance to Psychic dmg & adv on Int/Wis/Cha saves. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Laeral's Silver Lance
desc: Each creature of your choice in the Line must make a Str save or take 3d10 Force dmg & fall Prone (half dmg & no other effect on success). Upcast: +1d10 per slot lvl.

name: Leomund's Tiny Hut
desc: 9 creatures of Medium size or smaller fit inside. All other creatures & objects are barred from entering. Spells &magic effects are barred from passing through. You control the interior lighting, & the dome is opaque from the outside, transparent from inside. Inside atmosphere is comfortable & dry regardless of outside conditions. Spell ends if you leave dome. No upcast bonus.

name: Life Transference
desc: You take 4d8 Necrotic dmg & 1 creature you can see in range gains hp equal to 2x dmg you took. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Lightning Arrow
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting/missing w/ ranged atk
desc: As your ranged weapon atk hits/misses, it transforms into lightning bolt (4d8 Lightning dmg on hit, 1/2 dmg on miss). This replaces the normal atk. Hit or miss, creatures w/in 10 ft of target take 2d8 Lightning dmg (DEX save for 1/2 dmg). Weapon/ammo returns to normal after. Upcast: +1d8 dmg to both effects per slot lvl.

name: Lightning Bolt
desc: Deals 8d6 Lightning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Ignites combustibles. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Magic Circle
area: 10 ft rad x 20 ft tall cylinder
desc: Affects one or more of these types: Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead. Hedges them out, affected creatures have disadv on atks vs targets w/in cylinder, target w/in cylinder can't be Charmed/Frightened/Possessed by them. When cast, you can choose to make it operate in reverse, trapping creature w/in it. Upcast: +1 hr duration per slot lvl

name: Major Image
desc: Create image, including sounds, smells, & temp. Act to move image w/in range. Observers can spend Study Act to make Investigation check. Upcast: 4th+ (no conc required).

name: Mass Healing Word
desc: Creatures heal 2d4 + spellcasting ability mod. Upcast: +1d4 healing per slot lvl.

name: Meld into Stone
area: Stone surface large enough to contain you
desc: You merge into the stone; you are unable to see outside, but may make Perception checks to hear. The spell ends when you leave the stone. Partial destruction of stone expels you, dealing 6d6 Force dmg & you fall prone. Complete destruction expels you, dealing 50 Force dmg & you fall prone. No upcast bonus.

name: Melf’s Minute Meteors
desc: 6 tiny meteors orbit you. Bon Act on subsequent turns to hurl 1-2 meteors to points w/in range. Explodes at point or if hits solid surface, dealing 2d6 Fire dmg in 5 ft rad explosion (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +2 meteors per slot lvl.

name: Motivational Speech
desc: Targets gain 5 Temp HP & gain adv on Wis saves. When hit, targets gain adv on next atk it makes. After Temp HP lost, spell ends. Upcast: +5 Temp HP per slot lvl.

name: Nondetection
desc: Hide target/object (10 ft cube) from Divination magic/magical scrying sensors. No upcast bonus.

name: Phantom Steed
desc: Steed of your appearance appears w/in range (with saddle, etc). Creature you choose can ride. Riding Horse stats except Speed of 100 ft, 13 mph. When spell ends, steed gradually fades (1 min to dismount). Spell ends when dismissed or steed takes dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Plant Growth
desc: 2 versions: 1 Act, 100 ft rad - with exclusion areas you secify, plants grow thick (1/4 movement). 8 Hrs, plants in 1/2 mile rad yield 2x harvest for 1 year. No upcast bonus.

name: Protection From Energy
desc: Target gains Resistance to Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Pulse Wave
desc: Creatures in area take 6d6 Force dmg & are either pulled/pushed 15 ft towards/away from you (Con save negates). Unsecured objects are also pulled/pushed 15 ft. Upcast: +1d6 dmg & +5 ft pull/push per slot lvl.

name: Remove Curse
desc: All curses are removed. Breaks attunement to cursed items. No upcast bonus.

name: Revivify
desc: Return target to life with 1 HP that died w/in last min. Can't revive someone who died of old age, nor does it restore missing body parts. No upcast bonus.

name: Sending
desc: You send a short ≤25 word message to a familiar creature. Target can make equally short reply. Spell enables targets to understand messages. Across planes, there's a 5% chance the message doesn't arrive (you know if this happens). A creature can block your ability to reach them for 8 hrs.

name: Sleet Storm
area: 20 ft rad x 40 ft tall cylinder
desc: Freezing rain/sleet falls in 20 ft rad, 40 ft tall cylinder in range. Heavily obscured, extinguishes flames, covers ground in slick ice (difficult terrain). When creature enters for first time on turn or starts turn there, it falls prone & loses concentration (Dex save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Slow
desc: Targets in 40 ft cube are Slowed (Wis save negates). Slow = 1/2 Speed, -2 AC & Dex saves, can't use Reacts, can only take Bon Act or Act (not both), & can't make >1 atk in a turn. If casting spell w/ casting time of 1 Act, 25% chance the spell fails. Slowed creatures can make WIS save at end of turn to end effect. No upcast bonus.

name: Speak with Dead
desc: Ask a corpse 5 questions, it only knows what it knew in life; it doesn't have to tell the truth. No upcast bonus.

name: Speak with Plants
desc: Can question plants in area about events w/in area w/in past day. Can also turn difficult terrain into regular & vice versa for duration. Plants might perform other tasks (DM). If a plant creature is in area, can talk to it. No upcast bonus.

name: Spirit Guardians
desc: Protective spirits flit around in 15 ft Emanation. On casting, can designate creatures to be unaffected. Affected creature’s Speeds are halved in Emanation. Whenever Emanation enters a creature’s space & whenever a creature enters the Emanation or ends its turn there, the creature must make a Wis save. On a fail, take 3d8 Rad dmg (good/neutral) or 3d8 Necro dmg (evil). On a success, takes half dmg. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

name: Spirit Shroud
desc: Dead spirits flit around you. Your atks deals extra 1d8 Radiant/Necrotic/Cold dmg (your choice when cast). Any creature that takes the extra dmg can't regain HP until start of your next turn. Any visible creature of your choice that starts its turn w/in 10 ft of you has its Speed reduced by 10 ft until start of your next turn. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per 2 slot lvls.

name: Stinking Cloud
desc: Cloud is heavily obscured, flows around corners. Creatures in cloud at start of their turn becomes Poisoned (Con save negates). While Poisoned like this, they can't take Act or Bon Act. Strong wind disperses cloud.

name: Summon Fey
desc: Summon Fey spirit, using Fey Spirit stat block (choose Fuming/Mirthful/Tricksy on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Lesser Demons
desc: Summon Random Demons (1d6): 1-2 = two demons CR ≤1; 3-4 = Four demons CR ≤1/2; 5-6 = Eight demons CR ≤1/4. DM chooses demons, hostile to all creatures, own initiative, atks nearest non-demon. Can form blood circle as part of casting, which demons cannot enter or target w/in. Upcast: 6th-7th (2x demons), 8th-9th (3x demons).

name: Summon Shadowspawn
desc: Summon shadowy spirit, using Shadow Spirit stat block (choose Fury/Despair/Fear on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Undead
desc: Summon Undead spirit, using Undead Spirit stat block (choose Ghostly/Putrid/Skeletal on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Sylune's Viper
desc: Gain 15 Temp HP, the spell lasts until the duration expires or you lose these Temp HP. While active, you gain Climb Speed equal to your Speed, and can take a Magic Act to make a ranged spell atk against 1 creature w/in 50 ft, dealing 1d6 Force dmg & inflicting the Poisoned condition on hit (while the target is Poisoned by this effect, they're Incapacitated). Upcast: +5 Temp HP & +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Thunder Step
desc: Teleport yourself & up to one creature/carriable object to unoccupied space w/in range. All creatures w/in 10 ft of space you left take 3d10 Thunder dmg (Con save 1/2 dmg). Audible 300 ft away. Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Tidal Wave
desc: Wave up to 30 ft long x 10 ft wide x 10 ft high crashes down on an area. Creatures in area take 4d8 Bludgeoning dmg & are knocked Prone (Dex save for 1/2 dmg & no prone). Water spreads an extra 30 ft in all directions, extinguishing unprotected flames, then vanishes. No upcast bonus.

name: Tiny Servant
desc: Object animates under your control. Bon Act to mentally command while w/in 120 ft. You decide what Act/move it takes on its next turn. If no command, it defends itself. Follows order until complete. Upcast: +2 objects per slot lvl.

name: Tongues
desc: Grants target the ability to understand any spoken/seen language, & the target is understood by any creature that knows at least one language. No upcast bonus.

name: Vampiric Touch
desc: For duration, can make melee spell atk, dealing 3d6 Necrotic dmg & healing you for 1/2 Necrotic dmg dealt. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Wall of Sand
desc: Create wall of sand on ground at point you can see. Up to 30 ft long x 10 ft thick x 10 ft thick. Vanishes when spell ends. Blocks line of sight. Movement through it costs 3' per 1 ft moved. Creatures Blinded while w/in wall. No upcast bonus.

name: Wall of Water
desc: Create wall up to 30 ft long x 1 ft thick x 10 ft high on ground in range. Wall vanishes when spell ends. Wall's space is difficult terrain. Ranged atks passing through space have disadv; fire dmg halved through wall. Cold dmg causes area it passes through to freeze. Each 5 ft x 5 ft section has AC 5 & 15 HP. Destroyed sections aren't replaced. No upcast bonus.

name: Water Breathing
desc: Targets can breathe underwater in addition to normal breathing methods. No upcast bonus.

name: Water Walk
desc: Targets can move across any liquid surface. Submerged targets are brought to the surface at a rate of 60 ft per rnd. Affected target must take Bon Act to pass from liquid's surface into liquid & vice versa. No upcast bonus.

name: Wind Wall
desc: Create wall of wind up to 50 ft long x 1 ftthick x 15 ft high shaped any way you choose in continuous path along ground. Creatures in area take 3d8 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save for 1/2). Wind keeps gasses at bay. Small flying/gaseous creatures can't pass through wall. Ordinary projectiles passing through wall auto miss. No upcast bonus.

name: Arcane Eye
desc: Create Invisible, invulnerable eye w/in range that sees in all directions (normal & 30 ft darkvision). Bon Act to move the eye 30 ft in any direction, blocked by solid barriers. Eye can pass through 1 in diameter openings. No upcast bonus.

name: Aura of Life
desc: You & allies in aura gain Resistance to Necrotic dmg; HP max can't be reduced; regains 1 HP if at 0 HP when turn starts in the aura. No upcast bonus.

name: Aura of Purity
desc: You & allies in aura can't become diseased, gain Resistance to Poison dmg, & gain adv vs saves that cause Blind/Charm/Deaf/Fright/Paralysis/Poison/Stun. No upcast bonus.

name: Backlash
castingTime: React, in response to taking dmg
desc: Reduce incoming dmg by 4d6 + your spellcasting modifier. If the triggering dmg was caused by a creature w/in range, can force them to make a Con save or take 4d6 Force dmg (half dmg on success). Upcast: +1d6 dmg reduction & retaliation dmg per slot lvl.

name: Banishment
desc: Banish the target; if target is native, banished until spell ends. If target isn't native & spell lasts a full min, target doesn't return & is placed in a random location on its home plane. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Blight
desc: Target takes 8d8 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). No effect on Constructs/Undead. Plant creature or magical plant auto-fail save. Normal plants die. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Charm Monster
desc: Target must becomes Charmed by you (Wis save negates) until spell ends/it's harmed by you or allies. Charmed creature is friendly to you & knows it was charmed after. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Compulsion
desc: Visible targets w/in range & that can hear you are Charmed (Wis save negates). Bon Act to designate horizontal direction, each Charmed target moves max movement in that direction on its turns, taking safest route. After moving, target repeats save. No upcast bonus.

name: Confusion
desc: Affected target must make Wis save or they can't take Bon Acts or Reacts & must roll a d10 at the start of each of its turns: 1) Random Movement, target takes no Act, uses all its movement in a random direction determined by a d8; 2-6) Nothing, target does nothing, take no Acts & doesn't move; 7-8) Random Atk, target makes melee atk vs random creature in reach or does nothing; 9-10) Acts Normally, target chooses its behavior. It makes a new save to end effect at the end of turn. Upcast: +5 ft rad per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Minor Elementals
desc: Conjure elemental spirits that flit around you, causing any atk you make dealing an extra 2d8 Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning dmg (your choice per atk). The ground around you also becomes difficult terrain in area for enemies. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Woodland Beings
desc: Conjure nature spirits that flit around you, whenever a visible creature enters area & whenever area enters a visible creature's space, can force them to take 5d8 Force dmg once/turn (Wis save for 1/2 dmg). Also, can take Disengage Act as Bon Act for duration. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Control Water
desc: Choose an effect: 1) Flood, cause water lvl of all standing water in area to rise up to 20 ft or create 20 ft tall wave to travel from one side of area to other, w/ a 25% chance to capsize Huge or smaller vehicles; 2) Part Water, create a trench extending across area; 3) Redirect Flow, cause flowing water in area to move in a direction you choose; 4) Whirlpool, cause 50 ft sq x 25 ft deep whirlpool, pulling creatures in & dealing 2d8 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save negates). As an Act, you may choose a new effect each round. No upcast bonus.

name: Death Ward
desc: Next time target drops to 0 HP, instead drops to 1 HP. If spell is active when target is subjected to instant-kill effect w/out dealing dmg, the effect is negated & spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Dimension Door
desc: Teleport w/in range. Can be to a visible place, a visualized place, or a described distance. If arriving in an occupied space, you & creature riding along take 4d6 Force dmg & teleport fails. No upcast bonus.

name: Divination
desc: Ask single question about a goal/event/activity w/in 7 days. If cast more than once before finishing Long Rest, there's a cumulative 25% chance that no answer is received. No upcast bonus.

name: Dominate Beast
desc: Target Beast becomes Charmed, adv on save if you're fighting it. Can issue telepathic commands on turn (no Act required), target follows commands to best of its ability. Can use your React for target to take React. Any dmg grants another save. Upcast: 5th (10 min), 6th (1 Hr), 7th+ (8 Hrs).

name: Doomtide
desc:
Create a 20 ft radius Sphere of magical Darkness, lasting for duration or until a strong wind disperses it. Each creature in the Sphere when created must make a Wis save or take 5d6 Psychic dmg & subtract 1d6 from its saves until end of its next turn (half dmg & no other effects on success). Creatures also make the save when entering the Sphere, when the Sphere moves into their space, or when ending their turn in the Sphere (only once/turn). The Sphere moves 10 ft away from you at the start of each of your turns.
Casting as a Circle Spell: Casting as a Circle spell requires a min of five secondary casters & must provide a special component (a string of three black pearls from Pandemonium), which the spell consumes. Spell’s range increases to 1 mile, & its duration increases to Until Dispelled (no Concentration). Spell ends early if any caster who participated contributes to another casting of Doomtide as a Circle spell. Each secondary caster must also expend a lvl 3+ spell slot otherwise the spell fails.

name: Elemental Bane
desc: Choose Acid/Cold/FireLightning/Thunder. Target creature loses Resistance of that type & the first time it takes that type of dmg on a turn, it takes an extra 2d6 dmg of that type (Con save negates). Upcast: +1 target w/in 30 ft of each other per slot lvl.

name: Evard's Black Tentacles
desc: Area becomes difficult terrain. When creature enters area/starts turn in area, they take 3d6 Bludgeoning dmg & be Restrained for duration (Str save negates). Restrained creatures take 3d6 Bludgeoning dmg at start of turn. Target can make an Athletics check vs your spell save DC (Act) to free itself. No upcast bonus.

name: Fabricate
desc: Convert raw materials into finished products. Fabricate Large or smaller (w/in a 10 ft cube or eight 5 ft cubes) if have enough materials. Metal/stone/mineral objects must be Medium or in 5 ft cube or smaller. Can't create creatures/magic items. Can't create craftsmanship objects without appropriate tool proficiency. No upcast bonus.

name: Find Greater Steed
desc: Spirit takes form you choose (griffon/pegasus/peryton/dire wolf/rhino/sabertoothed tiger). Celestial/Fey version of type (See MM). Int becomes 6 minimum, can understand 1 language you speak. You control mount in combat, can speak telepathically to it w/in 1 mile, & spells targeting you can target mount (if mounted). Dismiss as Act. Casting again summons same mount. No upcast bonus.

name: Fire Shield
desc: Shed bright light in 10 ft & dim light for additional 10 ft. Gain Resistance to Cold/Fire (your choice); when hit by melee atk, atker takes 2d8 Cold/Fire dmg (opposite dmg type to previous choice). No upcast bonus.

name: Fount of Moonlight
desc: Shed bright light in 20 ft & dim light for additional 20 ft. Gain Resistance to Radiant dmg, & your melee atks deal extra 2d6 Radiant dmg on hit. Also, after taking dmg from visible creature w/in 60 ft, can React to Blind atker until end of your next turn (Con save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Freedom of Movement
