desc: Target's movement unaffected by difficult terrain & magic that reduces Speed/Paralyzes/Restrains. Can spend 5 ft of movement to escape from nonmagical constraints. Functions normally underwater. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Galder's Speed Courier
desc: Summon Small air elemental w/in range, who's formless, nearly transparent, dmg immune, & can't interact w/ other creatures/objects. It carries an open, empty chest of diameter of 3' on each side. Can name a familiar living creature & close chest, & elemental teleports into adjacent space to named target. Target is made aware of cest contents before it chooses to open or not, as well as spell duration. No other creature can open chest. Target can also order items to be returned. Upcast: 8th+ (Can send to interplanar creatures).

name: Gate Seal
desc: Fortify stationary 30 ft cube against interplanar travel. Upcast: 6th+ (Lasts until dispelled).

name: Giant Insect
desc: Summon giant centipede/spider/wasp (you choose), using Giant Insect stat block. Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Grasping Vine
desc: Conjure vine into empty space & make melee spell atk against visible creature w/in 30 ft of it, dealing 4d8 Bludgeoning dmg, is pulled 30 ft towards vine, & Huge or smaller creature is Grappled (Athletics check as Act to escape, vs your spell save DC). Until spell ends, you can use Bon Act to atk same/another creature. Upcast: +1 max creatures that can be Grappled per slot lvl.

name: Gravity Sinkhole
desc: Area of crushing force appears w/in range, dealing 5d10 Force dmg & pulling affected creatures toward sphere center (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no pull). Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Greater Invisibility
desc: Target becomes Invisible until spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Guardian of Faith
desc: Guardian occupies space & enemies that move w/in 10 ft of guardian take 20 Radiant dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Vanishes after it deals 60 total dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Guardian of Nature
desc: You transform into Primal Beast or Great Tree. Beast: +10 ft Walk Speed, Darkvision 120 ft, Str atks w/ adv, & +1d6 Force dmg on melee atks. Great Tree: +10 Temp HP, Con saves with adv, Dex & Wis atks w/ adv, & while on ground 15 ft rad is difficult terrain to enemies. No upcast bonus.

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
desc: Make natural terrain in range look, sound, & smell like some other sort of natural terrain. Tactile characteristics are unchanged. If difference isn't obvious by touch, a creature can attempt an Investigation check against your spell DC to disbelieve. No upcast bonus.

name: Ice Storm
area: 20 ft rad x 40 ft tall cylinder
desc: Deals 2d10 Bludgeoning dmg & 4d6 Cold dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Area becomes difficult terrain until end of your next turn. Upcast: +1d8 Bludgeoning dmg per slot lvl.

name: Leomund's Secret Chest
desc: Hide chest (up to 12 ft cube) on Ethereal plane. Can touch replica to call/send chest. After 60 days, 5% chance that spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Locate Creature
desc: Sense the direction to a familiar creature's location w/in range. Can't locate through any lead thickness. No upcast bonus.

name: Mordenkainen's Faithful Hound
desc: Conjure stationary Invisible dog (you can see). Barks at creatures w/in 30 ft that dont speak password. Sees Invisible/Ethereal & ignores illusions. Start of your turn, dog bites hostile creatures, dealing 4d8 Piercing dmg (Dex save negates). Magic Act to move hound 30 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Mordenkainen's Private Sanctum
desc: Ward area with various securities: prevent sound, vision, sensors, divination, teleportation & planar travel. Upcast: +100 ft cube per slot lvl.

name: Otiluke's Resilient Sphere
desc: Sphere of force encloses target (Dex save negates). Nothing can pass through barrier, though target can breathe. Sphere is immune to dmg & weightless. Enclosed creature can use Act to push sphere & roll it 1/2 Speed. Globe can be picked up & moved by creatures. Disintegrate spell destroys sphere without harming enclosed. No upcast bonus.

name: Phantasmal Killer
desc: Creature becomes takes 4d10 Psychic dmg & disadv on ability checks & atk rolls for duration (Wis save for 1/2 dmg & no disadv). Target re-makes Wis save at end of each of its turns, taking the Psychic dmg on fail, ending spell on success. Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Polymorph
desc: Polymorphs target into a Beast with CR ≤ target's lvl or CR (Wis save negates). Shapechangers auto-succeed. Target gains Temp HP equal to HP of the Beast form transformed into. Lasts for duration/until target drops to 0 Temp HP/dies. Assumes all stats of new for except alignment & personality. No upcast bonus.

name: Raulothim's Psychic Lance
desc: Visible creature or can name creature w/in range, they take 7d6 Psychic dmg & become Incapacitated until start of your next turn (Int save for 1/2 dmg & no incapacitate). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Shadow of Moil
desc: Flame-like shadows surround you (heavily obscured). Shadows turn dim light w/in 10 ft of you become darkness, bright light becomes dim. You have Resistance to Radiant dmg & when creature w/in 10 ft of you hits you w/ an atk, shadows lash it for 2d8 Necrotic dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Sickening Radiance
desc: Sphere lit by dim green light. Creatures moving into area for first time on turn/starting turn there take 4d10 Radiant dmg & suffer 1 Exhaustion lvl (Con save negates). Invisibility impossible. Light & exhaustion go away when spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Spirit of Death
desc: Conjure spirit in visible unoccupied space w/in range, using Reaper Spirit stat block. Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Staggering Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 4d6 Psychic dmg from atk, & becomes Stunned until end of your next turn (Wis save negates effect). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Stone Shape
desc: Medium or smaller stone object or 5 ft section of stone reshapes to suit your purposes. No upcast bonus.

name: Stoneskin
desc: Target gains Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, & Slashing dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Storm Sphere
desc: Each creature in sphere when it appears/ends turn in sphere takes 2d6 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save negates). Sphere space is difficult terrain. Bon Act to cause lightning bolt to leap from center (ranged spell atk w/ 60 ft range) dealing 4d6 Lightning dmg. Adv on atk if target is in sphere. Creatures w/in 30 ft of sphere have disadv on Perception checks to listen. Upcast: +1d6 to all dmg per slot lvl.

name: Summon Aberration
desc: Summon aberrant spirit, using Aberrant Spirit stat block (choose Beholderkin/Mind Flayer/Slaad on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Construct
desc: Summon construct spirit, using Construct Spirit stat block (choose Clay/Metal/Stone on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Elemental
desc: Summon elemental spirit, using Elemental Spirit stat block (choose Air/Earth/Fire/Water on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Greater Demon
desc: Summon demon CR ≤5 of your choice, w/ its own initiative & turns. You can issue commands (no Act), else it defends itself. At end of each of demon's turn, makes Cha save (disadv if you use its True Name). On success, your control breaks & demon stays for duration, atking nearest non-demons. Uncontrolled demon stays for 1d6 rounds. If make blood circle as part of casting, demon can't cross/target inside circle. Upcast: +1 CR per slot lvl.

name: Vitriolic Sphere
desc: Each creature in sphere takes 10d4 Acid dmg now & 5d4 Acid at the end of its next turn (Dex save for 1/2 initial dmg & no additional dmg). Upcast: +2d4 initial dmg per slot lvl.

name: Wall of Fire
area: 60 ft x 1 ft wall or 20 ft dia x 20 ft tall ring
desc: Creatures in area take 5d8 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). One side deals dmg w/in 10 ft - other is safe. Creatures take dmg when they end turn/enter area. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Watery Sphere
desc: 5 ft rad sphere of water appears, can hover at 10 ft. Creature in space must make Str save. Success = pushed nearest free space of target’s choice. Fail = Restrained. Save at end of each turn. Huge+ creatures auto-save. Large or smaller can choose to fail. Sphere can restrain 4 Med or 1 Large. Exceed capacity releases random creature (Prone). As Act, move sphere 30 ft in straight line. Drops to hover at 10 ft. Restrained creatures move with it. Can move sphere into creatures, forcing saves. When ends, sphere collapses, extinguishing normal flames within 30 ft. Restrained creatures fall prone. Water vanishes. No upcast bonus.

name: Widogast's Vault of Amber
desc: Arrange 5 amber gems into loose circle around non-living materials. All materials w/in circle are pulled into the gems & stored in stasis. Contents don't age/wither/rot. Act to release gem's contents onto ground. Contents also released if dispelled. No upcast bonus.

name: Widogast's Web of Fire
desc: 5 streams of fire snake along ground & erupt on targets, dealing 8d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Alternatively, all 5 streams can converge on 1 target, dealing 12d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Fire can travel over obstacles up to 5 ft high, igniting unworn/uncarried flammables. Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Animate Objects
desc: Objects come to life at your command. Medium or smaller targets count as one object, Large as two, Huge as three. Each target animates and becomes a creature under your command, using Animated Object stat block. Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block. Upcast: Slam dmg increases +1d4 (Medium or smaller) or +1d6 (Large) or +1d12 (Huge) per slot lvl.

name: Antilife Shell
desc: Area prevents creatures other than Undead & Constructs from entering. Blocked creatures can cast spells/make atks with ranged/reach weapons into sphere. If you force sphere onto blocked creatures, the spell ends. No upcast bonus.

name: Awaken
desc: Target gains Int of 10, speaks one language you know. Plants gain the ability to move. It's Charmed by you for 30 days or until you harm it. No upcast bonus.

name: Banishing Smite
castingTime: Bon Act, after hitting in melee
desc: Target takes extra 5d10 Force dmg from atk. If the atk reduces the target to 50 HP or less, you banish it as per the Banishment spell. No upcast bonus.

name: Bigby's Hand
desc: Create Large hand. AC 20, HP = your max, spell ends at 0 HP, Str 26, Dex 10. Doesn’t fill space. Bon Act: hand moves 60 ft & causes 1 effect: 1) Clenched Fist, melee spell atk dealing 5d8 Force dmg + spellcasting ability mod & pushing target 5 ft + 5*spellcasting ability mod (Str save negates); 3) Grasping Hand, target creature is Grappled (Dex save negates) w/ an escape DC equal to your spell save DC, & while Grappled, can use Bon Act to deal 4d6 Bludgeoning dmg + spellcasting ability mod; 4) Interposing Hand, hand grants you Half Cover against atks & effects, as well as being Difficult Terrain for enemies. Upcast: +2d8 dmg for Clenched Fist & +2d6 dmg for Grasping Hand per slot lvl.

name: Circle of Power
desc: Friendly creatures in area gain adv & Evasion on saves vs spells & magic effects. Aura moves with you. Saves allowing half dmg, result in no dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Cloudkill
desc: When creature enters/starts turn in area, takes 5d8 Poison dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Fog moves 10 ft away from you each turn. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Commune
desc: Ask & receive answers to 3 "Yes/No" questions. Answer may be "unclear". DM discretion on questions contradictory to deity's interests. Subsequent castings have a cumulative 25% chance for no reading. No upcast bonus.

name: Commune with Nature
desc: Outdoors, gain knowledge of land w/in 3 miles (300 ft underground). Spell fails in constructed areas (dungeons, cities). You learn 3 facts of your choice: 1) Settlement location; 2) Interplanar portal location; 3) Location of high CR Celestial/Elemental/Fey/Fiend/Undead; 4) Most prevalent plant/material/Beast (your choice); 5) Water body locations. No upcast bonus.

name: Cone Of Cold
desc: Deals 8d8 Cold dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Elemental
desc: Conjure Large intangible spirit (choose Air [Lightning]/Earth [Thunder]/Fire [Fire]/Water [Cold] on cast). Whenever a visible creature enters spirit's space/starts its turn w/in 5 ft takes 8d8 dmg of the spirit's type & Restrains target (Dex save negates). At start of Restrained target's turn, they take 4d8 dmg of spirit's type (Dex save ends Restrain). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Volley
area: 40 ft rad x 20 ft tall cylinder
desc: Throw/fire nonmagical weapon/ammo into air & choose point in range. Each creature in area takes 8d8  Force dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Contact Other Plane
desc: Contact other planar entity. DC 15 Int save to stay sane. On fail, 6d6 Pyschic dmg, & insane until long rest. On successful save, ask 5 questions. Entity answers “yes,” “no,” “maybe,” “never,” “irrelevant,” or “unclear”, or short phrase if confusing. No upcast bonus.

name: Contagion
desc: Target takes 11d8 Necrotic dmg & become Poisoned (Con save negates). While Poisoned, target has disadv on saves made with a chosen ability. Target repeats Con saves until they get 3 successes or failures. 3 Successes, spell ends. 3 fails, spell lasts for 7 days. Upon receiving effect to end Poisoned, target makes Con save. On fail, Poisoned continues. No upcast bonus.

name: Control Winds
desc: Choose 1 effect in area: 1) Gusts (choose calm/moderate/strong) moderate+ imposes disadv to ranged weapon atks, movement is difficult; 2) Downdraft = ranged weapon aks have disadv & flyers entering/starting turn knocked prone (Str save negates); 3) Updraft = half falling dmg, +10 ft vertical jump. No upcast bonus.

name: Create Spelljamming Helm
desc: Holding crystal rod used in casting, touch target chair. Rod disappears & the chair is transformed into Spelljamming Helm. No upcast bonus.

name: Creation
desc: Create nonliving object of matter in 5 ft cube. Duration depends on material (vegetable = 1 day, stone/crystal = 12 hrs, precious metals = 1 hr, gems = 10 mins, Adamantine/mithral = 1 min). Upcast: +5 ft to cube dimensions for each slot lvl.

name: Danse Macabre
desc: Create zombies/skeletons from corpses. They gain bonus to atk/dmg equal to your spellcasting mod. Bon Act to command created w/in 60 ft. You decide Acts/move of created on their next turn, else they defend themselves. Upcast: +2 corpses per slot lvl.

name: Dawn
area: 30 ft rad x 40 ft tall cylinder
desc: Sunlight shines in cylinder. Creatures in cylinder when cast or ending turn there take 4d10 Radiant dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Bon Act to move cylinder 60 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Destructive Wave
desc: Each creature you choose w/in range takes 5d6 Thunder dmg & 5d6 Radiant/Necrotic dmg & be knocked prone (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no prone). No upcast bonus.

name: Dispel Evil and Good
desc: Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, & Undead have disadv on atks vs you. Can end the spell early by using either of these: Break Enchant: Removes Charmed/Frightened/Possessed from a target. Dismiss: Cha save or creature is Banished to home plane. No upcast bonus.

name: Dominate Person
desc: Target becomes Charmed, adv on save if you're fighting it. Can issue telepathic commands on turn (no Act required), target follows commands to best of its ability. Can use your React for target to take React. Any dmg grants another save. Upcast: 6th (10 min), 7th (1 Hr), 8th+ (8 Hrs).

name: Dream
desc: Send dreams to target. Can also send nightmares, dealing 3d6 Psychic dmg on failed save & don't get rest (Wis save negates). If you have part of the creature, disadv on save. No upcast bonus.

name: Enervation
desc: Drain life from target for 4d8 Necrotic dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg & ends spell). On failure, spell continues: spend Act to auto deal 4d8 Necrotic dmg to target. Spell ends if you use your Act to do anything else, if target leaves spell range, or target has total cover. You regain HP equal to 1/2 dmg target takes from spell. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Far Step
desc: Teleport up to 60 ft to visible space. Teleport again on each of your turns as Bon Act. No upcast bonus.

name: Flame Strike
area: 10 ft rad x 40 ft tall column
desc: Creatures take 4d6 Fire & 4d6 Radiant dmg, save for 1/2. Upcast: +1d6 Fire/Radiant dmg per slot lvl.

name: Freedom of the Winds
desc: Gain Fly Speed of 60 ft, gain adv on checks to avoid Grapples & saves against being Restrained/Paralyzed. While targeted by spell/atk, can use React to teleport 60 ft to unoccupied visible space. If movement takes you out of range, you're unaffected by targeted spell/atk. Spell ends after teleport. No upcast bonus.

name: Geas
desc: Target becomes Charmed & issue nonsuicidal command, target takes 5d10 Psychic dmg each time it acts in a manner countering your instructions, but only 1/day. Remove Curse/Greater Restoration/Wish ends spell. Upcast: 7th/8th (1 year duration), 9th (lasts until dispelled).

name: Greater Restoration
desc: Choose one: 1) Reduce Exhaustion lvl by 1; 2) End Charm/Petrify; 3) End curse & attunement to cursed item; 4) Clear ability score reduction on target; 5) Clear max HP reduction on target. No upcast bonus.

name: Hallow
desc: Area acts as Magic Circle. Choose any of the creature types Celestial/Elemental/Fey/Fiend/Undead. Chosen creature types can't enter area, creatures w/in area can't be Charmed/Frightened/Possessed by creature types, & choose an extra effect: 1) Courage, creatures can't be Frightened; 2) Darkness, Darkness fills area; 3) Daylight, bright light fills area; 4) Resistance, Resistance to one dmg type, 5) Vulnerability, Vulnerability to one dmg type; 6) Everlasting Rest, dead bodies are immune to becoming Undead; 7) Extradimensional Interference, teleporting stuff doesn't work; 8) Fear, creatures Frightened in area; 9) Silence, area silenced; 10) Tongues, creatures can communicate regardless of language. No upcast bonus.

name: Hold Monster
desc: Target become Paralyzed (Wis save negates). At the end of each of its turns, it makes a Wis save to end the effect. Upcast: +1 target per slot lvl.

name: Holy Weapon
desc: Weapon emits bright light (30 ft), deals +2d8 Radiant dmg on hit, becomes magic. Bon Act: dismiss spell & cause weapon to burst. Creatures w/in 30 ft take 4d8 Radiant dmg & are Blind (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no blind). Blind creatures save at end of each turn to end Blind. No upcast bonus.

name: Immolation
desc: Creature takes 8d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). On fail, target is wreathed in fire, bright light (30 ft rad). Immolated target take 4d6 Fire dmg at end of its turn & gets another save (Dex save negates & ends effect). Flames can't be extinguished nonmagically. Killed targets get turned to ash. No upcast bonus.

name: Infernal Calling
desc: Summon devil CR ≤6 of your choice. Roll Initiative for devil (unfriendly to you & may atk/bargain). On your turns, you can try to make Deception/Intimidate/Persuasion check vs devil's Insight (Adv if you use True Name) to make devil follow your commands. If it succeeds, it's immune. If conc. ends early, devil stays if immune to commands for 3d6 mins. If possess devil talisman, can summon +1 CR with no CHA checks. Upcast: +1 CR per slot lvl.

name: Insect Plague
desc: Each creature in area takes 4d10 Piercing dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Creatures entering/ending a turn make this save. Upcast: +1d10 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Jallarzi's Storm of Radiance
area: 10 ft rad x 40 ft tall cylinder
desc: Create storm of flashing light & thunder, Blinding & Deafening creatures w/in area, also dealing 2d10 Radiant dmg & 2d10 Thunder dmg (Con save or 1/2 dmg). Creatures make save when entering area/ending turn in area (only once/turn). Upcast: +1d10 Radiant & Thunder dmg per slot lvl.

name: Legend Lore
desc: You learn significant lore about a famous person/place/object. Lore consists of important details, amusing revalations, or even secret lore. The more you know to begin w/, the more you learn. No upcast bonus.

name: Maelstrom
area: 30 ft rad x 5 ft deep water mass
desc: Water appears & swirls on visible point on ground/in water. Area is difficult terrain. Starting turn in zone takes 6d6 Bludgeoning dmg & is pulled 10 ft towards center (Str save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
desc: Heals 5d8 + spellcasting ability mod. No effect on Undead/Constructs. Upcast: +1d8 healing per slot lvl.

name: Mislead
desc: Become Invisible & illusory clone of you appears where you stand. Double lasts for duration, Invisibilty lasts until you atk/cast spell. Can use Act to move clone 2x Speed & control behavior. Can use Bon Act to gain its senses instead of your own, or switch back. No upcast bonus.

name: Modify Memory
desc: Modify creature's memory on failed Wis save (adv if its in combat). Modify memory up to 10 mins w/in last 24 hrs. While being modified, it's Incapacitated, Charmed, & unaware of surrounding. You can erase all memory of event, allow perfect recall, change details, and/or create new event. Language dependent. Remove Curse/Greater Restoration restores true memory. Upcast: 6th (7 days ago), 7th (30 days ago), 8th (1 year ago), 9th (Anytime ago).

name: Negative Energy Flood
desc: Unless Undead, target takes 5d12 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Target killed by spell rises as zombie at start of your next turn. If target is Undead, instead gains 1/2 of 5d12 Temp HP. No upcast bonus.

name: Passwall
area: 5 ft wide x 8 ft tall x 20 ft deep passage
desc: Creates passage on wooden/plaster/stone surface w/in range & lasts for duration. It creates no instability in a surrounding structure. When opening disappears, occupants are safely ejected on initial cast surface. No upcast bonus.

name: Planar Binding
desc: Attempt to bind a Celestial/Elemental/Fey/Fiend to your service. The creature must stay in range for entire casting time. Target makes a Cha save; on failure it is bound to serve you. Upcast: 6th (10 days), 7th (30 days), 8th (180 days), 9th (366 days).

name: Raise Dead
desc: Bring creature back to life (dead ≤10 days) w/ 1 HP. Neutralizes poisons, but doesn't restore missing body parts. Target has -4 penalty to d20 rolls, reduced by 1 every Long Rest. No upcast bonus.

name: Rary's Telepathic Bond
desc: Create telepathic link among targets (minimum Int of 3). Targets can communicate telepathically regardless of common language & over any distance on same plane. No upcast bonus.

name: Reincarnate
desc: Touch dead Humanoid/piece of one that died in last 10 days. If it's willing to come back, spell makes new adult body randomly determined DM or d100 roll. See PHB for table. Creature remembers old life & retains capabilities except racial traits. No upcast bonus.

name: Scrying
desc: You can see & hear a particular creature you choose. Target makes a Wis save modified by how well you know them. Secondhand knowledge (+5 save mod), Firsthand knowledge (+0 save mod), Extensive knowledge (-5 save mod). If you have the target's picture/likeness (-2 save mod), garment/possesion (-4 save mod), or part of them (-10 save mod). On a successful save, target isn't affected & can't be reaffected for 24 hrs. On a failed save, create Invisible & intangible w/in 10 ft of target & can see & hear through sensor. Sensor moves w/ target. Can also target familiar location, & sensor doesn't move. No upcast bonus.

name: Seeming
desc: Make any amount of creatures look differently (1 ft shorter/taller, thin, fat, same body type). Details are up to you. If unwilling, Cha save negates. Others must touch targets or can take Study Act to make Investigation check vs your spell save DC to see through illusion. No upcast bonus.

name: Skill Empowerment
desc: Target gains expertise in a skill of your choice (2x proficiency). No upcast bonus.

name: Steel Wind Strike
desc: Melee spell atk up to 5 creatures w/in range, dealing 6d10 Force dmg, then teleport to empty space w/in 5 ft of one of the targets. No upcast bonus.

name: Summon Celestial
desc: Summon Celestial spirit, using Celestial Spirit stat block (choose Avenger/Defender on cast). Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Summon Dragon
desc: Summon Dragon spirit, using Draconic Spirit stat block. Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Swift Quiver
desc: On each of your turns, can use Bon Act to make 2 atks with weapon that uses ammo from quiver you touch. Quiver auto-replaces ammo used with these atks.

name: Synaptic Static
desc: Creatures w/ Int of 3+ take 8d6 Psychic dmg (Int save for 1/2 dmg & no muddle). On failed save, target has muddled thoughts for 1 min, subtracting 1d6 from atk rolls, ability checks, & concen saves. Target can make Int saves at end of each turn to end. No upcast bonus.

name: Telekinesis
desc: On cast/subsequent Magic Act: target creature/object (Spellcasting ability check vs Str check if contested). Creature: Huge or smaller, suspended in air, Restrained until end of your next turn, can move it 30 ft in any direction. Act maintains with checks. Object: up to 1k lbs & do fine actions, move 30 ft. If carried/worn, spellcasting check to pull object away & move. No upcast bonus.

name: Teleportation Circle
desc: Draw 5 ft rad circle linked to permanent teleportation circle whose sequence you know. Portal appears until end of your next turn that teleports creatures entering to linked circle. When you learn spell, you learn sequences for 2 destinations on Prime Material plane. Can learn more sequences by studying it for 1 min. Cast every day for 1 year, becomes permanent. No upcast bonus.

name: Temporal Shunt
castingTime: React, when a creature makes atk/casts a spell
desc: Triggering visible creature vanishes to another point in time, causing the atk to miss or spell to be wasted (Wis save negates). At start of its next turn, target reappears & doesn't remember this spell or being affected by it. Upcast: +1 target w/in 30 ft per slot lvl.

name: Transmute Rock
desc: Affect 40 ft cube of mud/stone, choose effect: Rock to Mud - 1/4 movement, Str save when enter/start turn. Fail = sink into mud (Restrained & Act to pull free). If cast on ceiling, mud falls for 4d8 Bludgeoning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Mud to Rock = 10 ft deep or less Restrains creatures in rock (Dex save negates & shunts to surface). Act to attempt to break free (Str DC 20) or dealing 25 dmg to rock. No upcast bonus.

name: Tree Stride
desc: Teleport by stepping into tree & emerging from another w/in 500 ft. Use 5 ft movement to enter tree of your size+. Use 5 ft to leave tree. No upcast bonus.

name: Wall of Force
desc: Conjure Invisible wall, can be free or floating or on surface, any orientation. Can be 10 ft rad dome/sphere or flat wall of up to ten congruent 10 ft x 10 ft panels. Nothing can physically pass through the wall. Immune to all dmg & Dispel Magic. Disintegrate destroys wall. Wall also extends to ethereal plane. No upcast bonus.

name: Wall of Light
desc: Conjure 60 ft long x 10 ft tall x 5 ft thick wall, emitting bright light for 120 ft, blocks line of sight but not creatures. Creatures in wall when cast or at end of turn take 4d8 Radiant dmg & are Blinded for 1 min (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no Blind). Blind can save at end of turn to shake. Until spell ends, can use Act to launch beam from wall a 1 creature w/in 60 ft of it. Ranged spell atk, dealing 4d8 Radiant dmg. Hit or miss, reduce length of wall by 10 ft. Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Wall Of Stone
desc: You create a wall out of contiguous panels, either 10 ft x 10 ft x 6 inches thick or 10 ft x 20 ft x 3 inches thick. If a creature would be surrounded, it gets a Dex save; on success it can move up to its Speed to not be enclosed. Each panel has AC 15 & 30 HP per inch of thickness, as well as Immunity to Poison & Psychic dmg. If concen maintained for full duration, wall becomes permanent & can't be Dispelled. No upcast bonus.

name: Wrath of Nature
desc: Animate trees/rocks/grass in area. Grass: difficult terrain; Trees: enemies w/in 10 ft of tree Dex save or take 4d6 slashing; Roots/Vines: at end of your turn, 1 grounded creature make Str save or become Restrained (Athletics vs your spell save DC to escape); Rocks: Bon Act on your turn, ranged atk to launch rock at creature (ranged spell atk , dealing 3d8 Nonmagical Bludgeoning dmg, Str save or Prone). No upcast bonus.

name: Yolande's Regal Presence
desc: When a visible creature enters the area, can force them to take 4d6 Psychic dmg, fall Prone, & be pushed 10 ft away (Wis save for 1/2 dmg & no prone & push). Only one save per turn. No upcast bonus.

name: Arcane Gate
desc: Create 2 linked portals, one w/in 10 ft of you and another w/in 500 ft. Ring is visible/usable from one side of your choice. Portals block vision. Rotate portal as Bon Act. No upcast bonus.

name: Blade Barrier
desc: Create a wall 100 ft long x 20 ft tall x 5 ft thick or a ring 60 ft dia x 20 ft tall x 5 ft thick, providing Three-Quarters Cover & its space is difficult terrain. Creatures entering area/starting turn in area take 6d10 Force dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Bones of the Earth
desc: Pillars burst from ground at points you see. If created under creature, Dex save or be lifted w/ it. Pillars are up to 30 ft high, AC 5, 30 HP. If pushed into solid object/ceiling, creature takes 6d6 Bludgeoning dmg & is Restrained. Restrained creature can use Act to make Str/Dex check vs your spell save DC to move/fall off pillar. Upcast: +2 pillars per slot lvl.

name: Chain Lightning
desc: Target takes 10d8 Lightning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg) May target up to 3 additional targets w/in 30 ft of primary target. Upcast: +1 secondary target per slot lvl.

name: Circle of Death
desc: Creatures in area take 8d8 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2). Upcast: +2d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Conjure Fey
desc: Summon Medium spirit, appears as Fey creature of your choice. On cast, can make melee spell atk against creature w/in 5 ft of it, dealing 3d12 + your spellcasting ability mod Psychic dmg & target becomes Frightened until start of your next turn (scared of both spirit & you). On subsequent turns, can use Bon Act to teleport spirit 30 ft & make another atk. Upcast: +1d12 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Contingency
desc: Choose spell of 5th lvl or lower with casting time of 1 Act that can target you. Cast as part of this spell, expending slots for both. Takes effect on a trigger you specify. Targets only you. You can only have 1 Contingency active at a time. No upcast bonus.

name: Create Homunculus
desc: Sacrifice 2d4 HP to create homunculus (see Monster Manual). When you finish long rest, spend up to 1/2 your Hit Die (+ Con mod) to reduce your Max HP & transfer to homonculus Max HP. Lasts until you finish another long rest. No upcast bonus.

name: Create Undead
desc: Create one Ghoul per corpse. Bon Act to command them while w/in 120 ft. If no issued commands, Ghouls take Dodge Act & only move to avoid harm. Control for 24 hrs. Can recast on existing Ghouls to reassert control. Upcast: 7th (4 Ghouls), 8th (5 Ghouls, 2 Ghasts, or 2 Wights), 9th (6 Ghouls, 3 Ghasts, 3 Wights, or 2 Mummies).

name: Disintegrate
desc: Target takes 10d6 + 40 Force dmg (Dex save negates). If this dmg reduces a creature to 0 HP, it's disintegrated into dust (only revivable with True Resurrection/Wish). Spell auto-dissolves Large or smaller nonmagical object or magical force creation. Upcast: +3d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Drawmij's Instant Summons
desc: Touch object ≤10 lbs or ≤6 ft long. Any time after, can use Magic Act to speak object name & crush sapphire component. Item instantly appears in your hand regardless of plane/distance. If creature is holding item, it doesn't appear but you learn who is holding it & roughly where they are at that moment. No upcast bonus.

name: Druid Grove
desc: Summon spirits to protect area (excluding buldings/structures). Cast spell every day for 1 year & it becomes permanent. Can specify creatures immune & password. Dispel Magic dispells 1 effect of caster's choice. Effects include: 1) Solid Fog, fill any number of 5 ft squares on ground w/ thick fog reaching 10 ft high, difficult terrain; 2) Grasping Undergrowth, fill any number of 5 ft squares on ground as if affected by Entangle spell; 3) Grove Guardians, animate up to 4 trees in area, who become Awakened Tree monster, they drive off intruders & obey spoken commands; 4) Gust of Wind, as detailed in spell of same name in two choice locations; 5) Spike Growth, as detailed in spell of same name in one choice location; 6) Wind Wall, as deatiled in spell of same name in one choice location. No upcast bonus.

name: Eyebite
desc: Creature you see w/in 60 ft is affected by 1 effect of your choice (Wis save negates): Asleep, Panic, Sickened. On each of your turns, can take Magic Act to target another creature that hasn't succeeded on this save yet. Asleep creatures are Unconscious until shaking/dmg to wake. Panicked creatures are Frightened of you, must take Dash Act to move away, if moves 60 ft+ & out of sight, effect ends. Sickened creatures have Poisoned condition. No upcast bonus.

name: Find The Path
desc: Find shortest physical route to fixed & familiar location.

name: Fizban's Platinum Shield
desc: Target sheds 5 ft of dim light, has Half Cover, gains Resistance to Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, & Poison dmg, & gains Evasion (on Dex saves, on success they take no dmg, on fail they take 1/2 dmg). Can move shield as Bon Act to another creature w/in 60 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Flesh to Stone
desc: Fleshy creature must make Con save. On fail, they're Restrained as skin hardens. Must make save at end of its turns. 3 successes & the spell ends. 3 fails & creature is turned to stone for duration. If you maintain concentration for duration, target is Petrified permanently until ended by Greater Restoration (or similar magic). No upcast bonus.

name: Forbiddance
desc: Create a ward up to 40,000 ft sq big x 30 ft high against magical travel. Creatures can't teleport into area or use portals/planar travel into area. Damages Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead (choose any number). Choose type when cast: when type enters or starts turn there, takes 5d10 Radiant/Necrotic dmg (choice on cast). Password protects creature if uttered. If cast everyday for 30 days in same location, lasts until dispelled. No upcast bonus.

name: Globe of Invulnerability
desc: Blocks spells 5th lvl or lower from entering the sphere. Upcast: +1 lvl of blocked spells per slot lvl.

name: Gravity Fissure
desc: Each creature in line takes 8d8 Force dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Creatures w/in 10 ft of line take 8d8 Force dmg & are pulled into line's area (Con save for negates). Upcast: +1d8 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Guards and Wards
desc: Protect up to 2500 ft sq area (50 ft square x 20 ft tall, 25 contiguous 10 ft squares, or 100 contiguous 5 ft squares). Specify individuals unaffected. Create 4 effects: 1) Corridors, fog fills all warded corridors, Heavily Obscuring them, & affected creatures have 50% chance to get turned around; 2) Doors, all doors are affected by Arcane Lock & can cover doors w/ illusions to appear as walls; 3) Stairs, fill all stairs w/ Web spell, which regrow in 10 mins if destroyed if spell lasts; 4) Dancing Lights, as detailed in spell of same name; 5) Magic Mouth, as detailed in spell of same name in two choice locations; 6) Stinking Cloud, as detailed in spell of same name in two choice locations, returning w/in 10 mins if dispersed while spell lasts; 7) Gust of Wind, as detailed in spell of same name in one choice location; 8) Suggestion, in one 5 ft space as mental command. No upcast bonus.

name: Harm
desc: Visible target takes 14d6 Necrotic dmg & its Max HP is reduced by same amount (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no Max HP effect). Dmg can't reduce target below 1 HP. No upcast bonus.

name: Heal
desc: Heals 70 HP, ends Blindness, Deafness, & Poisoned. Upcast: +10 HP per slot lvl.

name: Heroes' Feast
desc: 1 Hr to consume. Creatures who eat are cured of diseases & Poison, gain Resistance to Poison dmg, gain Immunity to Poisoned & Fear conditions, & gain adv on Wis saves. Their Max HP increases by +2d10. No upcast bonus.

name: Investiture of Flame
desc: Shed bright light for 30 ft, dim light for another 30 ft, gain Immunity to Fire dmg, Resistance to Cold dmg, creatures moving adjacent or ending turn adjacent to you take 1d10 Fire dmg, can use your Act to create 15 ft long x 5 ft wide line of fire dealing 4d8 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg) to all in line. No upcast bonus.

name: Investiture of Ice
desc: Gain Immunity to Cold dmg, Resistance to Fire dmg, ignore difficult terrain from ice/snow, ground in 10 ft rad around you is difficult terrain, can use your Act to blast 15 ft cone dealing 4d6 Cold dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Investiture of Stone
desc: Gain Resistance to dmg from nonmagical weapons, ignore difficult terrain made of earth/stone, move through solid earth as if it was air but can't end turn there, can use Act to shake ground in 15 ft rad from you (Dex save or be knocked prone). No upcast bonus.

name: Investiture of Wind
desc: Ranged weapons atks against you have disadv, gain 60 ft Fly Speed, can use Act to create 15 ft windy cube w/in 60 ft. Creatures in cube take 2d10 Bludgeoning dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Large or smaller creature failing save are pushed 10 ft from cube center. No upcast bonus.

name: Magic Jar
desc: You transfer your soul to the container material component, your body goes catatonic. While in container, you're aware of surroundings as if your body was in container's space. You can't move, take Reacts, & the only Act you can take is to project your soul 100 ft out of container or attempt to possess another Humanoid's body (targets affected by Protection from Evil and Good/Magic Circle spell immune). On possesion, target's soul enters the container as you enter their body (Cha save negates & makes target immune to this Act for 24 hrs). Once successful possession, your HP, Hit Die, Str/Dex/Con, Speed, & senses are replaced with new body's (keep your Int/Wis/Cha). Original body's soul can perceive from container but can't move & is Incapacitated. You can use Magic Act to return to container if it's w/in 100 ft, returning original soul to its body. If host body dies w/ you in it, you make Cha save against your own spell save DC or die. If container is destroyed/spell ends, your soul returns to your body (if body is not w/in 100 ft & alive, you die). Same circumstances for another creature's soul if container is destroyed. When spell ends, container is destroyed. No upcast bonus.

name: Mass Suggestion
desc: Language dependent. Suggest reasonable course of activity, as detailed in Suggestion spell. Upcast: 7th (10 days), 8th (30 days), 9th (366 days).

name: Mental Prison
desc: Bind creature to mental cell (Int save negates & target takes 5d10 Psychic dmg). On fail, make area around target appear dangerous to it (you choose). Target can't see/hear beyond and is Restrained. If target is moved out of illusion, makes atk through it, or reaches through it, they take 10d10 Psychic dmg & spell ends. Immune to spell if immune to Charm (but still takes 5d10 Psychic dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Move Earth
desc: Reshape dirt/sand/clay in 40 ft sq area. Raise/lower elevation, create/fill trench, erect/flatten walls, etc. Change cannot exceed 1/2 of area's largest dimension. Each change takes 10 min. Every 10 min, you can choose new area of terrain to affect. Cannot directly manipulate plants, natural stone, or stone constructions, though shifts can move/collapse them. No upcast bonus.

name: Otiluke's Freezing Sphere
desc: Sphere explodes for 10d6 Cold dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Freeze watery surfaces up to 6 inches (not creatures). May trap swimmers (Act to make Athletics check vs your spell save DC). Can hold globe & hurl 40 ft/shoot via sling/set it down (explodes after 1 min). Upcast: +1d6 dmg per slot lvl.

name: Otto's Irresistible Dance
desc: Target must use all movement to dance in place & has disadv on Dex saves & atks (Wis save negates). Target's enemies also have adv to hit it. Target can use Act to attempt save. No upcast bonus.

name: Planar Ally
desc: You ask cosmic being for aid. Sends Celestial/Elemental/Fiend loyal to it to help you. Appears in empty space w/in range. You can request specific creature by name (not guaranteed). Creature is not under your control, but may negotiate payment (Base for min-task is 100 gp a min, for hr-task is 1000 gp a hr, for day-task is 10000 gp a day up to 10 days). No upcast bonus.

name: Primordial Ward
desc: Gain Resistance to Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, & Thunder dmg. React: if you take dmg from one of those types, can choose to gain Immunity to it until end of your next turn, but lose other Resistances from spell (& spell ends). No upcast bonus.

name: Programmed Illusion
desc: Create programmed illusion of object/creature/other visible phenomenon w/in 30 ft cube. You decide specifics. Can last 5 min, then dormant for 10 min, & can be re-triggered (general/detailed based on visual/audible conditions). Physical interaction reveals illusion, or Act to make Investigation check vs your spell save DC. No upcast bonus.

name: Scatter
desc: Teleport each affected target to unoccupied visible space w/in 120 ft of you on ground (Wis save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Soul Cage
castingTime: React, when a Humanoid dies w/in range
desc: When visible Humanoid w/in range dies, snatch soul into tiny cage, which you can then exploit up to 6 times then spell ends: 1) Steal Life, Bon Act to regain 2d8 HP; 2) Query Soul, telepathically ask soul, it answers truthfully & to best of its ability in 1-2 sentences (no Act); 3) Borrow Experience, Bon Act to gain adv on next atk/ability check/save before start of your next turn; 4) Eyes of the Dead, Act to name place the soul saw in life & Scry on that location for 10 min (concen). No upcast bonus.

name: Summon Fiend
desc: Summon Fiend spirit, using Fiendish Spirit stat block. Creature is an ally to you, shares your Initiative but goes directly after you, obeys verbal commands, & takes Dodge Act & moves to avoid danger if no commands are given. Upcast: noted on stat block.

name: Sunbeam
desc: Creatures in line take 6d8 Radiant dmg & are Blinded (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no blind). For duration, can use Magic Act to fire a new beam. Hand also sheds bright sunlight light 30 ft (dim 60 ft). No upcast bonus.

name: Tasha's Bubbling Cauldron
desc: Cauldron appears w/in range (can't be moved & disappears when spell ends), full of liquid that duplicates Common/Uncommon potion effects of your choice. Bon Act for you/ally to reach into cauldron & take a potion of that kind. Cauldron can produce a number of potions equal to your spellcasting ability modifier (min of 1), & disappears after dispensing potions. Unconsumed potions disappear w/ cauldron. No upcast bonus.

name: Tasha's Otherworldly Guise
desc: Choose Upper/Lower Plane: gain Immunity to Radiant & Necrotic dmg (Upper) or Fire & Poison dmg (Lower), Immunity to Charmed (Upper) or Poisoned (Lower), Fly Speed of 40 ft, +2 AC, all weapon atks can use spellcasting ability & are magical, & you can atk twice when using Atk Act (ignore if you have Extra Atk feature). No upcast bonus.

name: Tenser's Transformation
desc: Gain 50 Temp HP, adv on atk rolls w/ Simple & Martial weapons, +2d12 Force dmg on weapon atks, proficiency w/ all armor, shields, Simple & Martial weapons, proficiency in Str/Con saves, & can atk twice with Atk Act. When spell ends, suffer 1 Exhaustion lvl (Con save DC 15 negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Transport via Plants
desc: Create link between Large+ inanimate plant in range & another plant on same plane. Must have seen/touched the destination plant before. For duration, creature can step into plant & exit destination plant using 5 ft of movement. No upcast bonus.

name: True Seeing
desc: Target gains Truesight, notices secret doors, & can see into the ethereal plane for 120 ft. No upcast bonus.

name: Wall of Ice
area: 10 10 ft x 10 ft panels or 10 ft rad sphere
desc: Create dome/sphere (10 ft rad) or up to ten contiguous 10 ft x 10 ft panels. If wall is placed on creature's space, it takes 10d6 Cold dmg & is pushed to one side of wall of your choice (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Each 10 ft section has AC 12, 30 HP, & is Vulnerable to Fire dmg. If damaged to 0 HP, section leaves hole of freezing air. First time creature moves through air on turn, takes 5d6 Cold dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +2d6 initial dmg & +1d6 frigid air dmg per slot lvl.

name: Wall of Thorns
area: 60 ft long x 10 ft tall x 5 ft thick wall or 20 ft dia x 20 ft tall x 5 ft thick circle
desc: Conjure wall (60 ft x 10 ft x 5 ft) or circle (20 ft x 20 ft x 5 ft), blocks line of sight. Creature in area when appears take 7d8 Piercing dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). 1/4 movement through wall. Creatures entering/ending turn in wall take 7d8 Slashing dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Upcast: +1d8 dmg for both instances per slot lvl.

name: Widogast's Transmogrification
desc: Permanently alter physical body of a Humanoid into another Humanoid body. They lose previous racial traits & gain new racial traits (aside from languages known). Target can also alter their gender. When spell ends, caster & target suffer 1 Exhaustion lvl. Once affected, a target cannot be affected by this spell for 1 year. No upcast bonus.

name: Wind Walk
desc: Targets assume gaseous form, gain 300 ft Fly Speed & Resistance to nonmagical weapon dmg. The only Act targets can take are Dash or revert to normal (1 min, Incapacitated while changing). Can revert to cloud form if spell still active, 1 min to revert back. If cloud when spell ends, slowly floats down 60 ft per round for 1 min. No upcast bonus.

name: Word of Recall
desc: Targets teleport to previously designated sanctuary, appearing in nearest unoccupied space. Santuary must be pre-designated via this spell & must be dedicated to/strongly linked to your diety. No upcast bonus.

name: Conjure Celestial
area: 10 ft rad x 40 ft tall cylinder
desc: Summon spirit from Upper Planes, each creature w/in area is affected Healing Light or Searing Light (your choice): 1) Healing Light, target regains 4d12 + your spellcasting ability mod HP; 2) Searing Light, target takes 6d12 Radiant dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Bright light also fills cylinder, & you can move cylinder 30 ft as part of youre movement. Creatures are affected when cylinder enters their space/ends its turn in it, only affected once per turn. Upcast: +1d12 healing & dmg per slot lvl.

name: Create Magen
desc: When casting, place quicksilver vial in chest of life-sized human doll & drip your blood on it. Your Max HP decreases equal to CR of chosen Magen (only Wish can restore Max HP). Created Magen obeys your commands w/out question. No upcast bonus.

name: Crown of Stars
desc: 7 star-like motes orbit your head. Bon Act to send 1 mote at creature/object w/in 120 ft of you as ranged spell atk. On hit, deals 4d12 Radiant dmg. Spell ends if motes all motes used. 4+ motes shed bright light 30 ft rad, 1-3 motes dim light 30 ft rad. Upcast: +2 motes per slot lvl.

name: Delayed Blast Fireball
desc: Creatures in area take 12d6 Fire dmg, +1d6 dmg per round it was delayed. Upcast: +1d6 base Fire dmg per slot lvl.

name: Divine Word
desc: Chosen creatures that can hear you make Cha save to avoid. 50 HP or less = Deafened for 1 min; 40 HP or less = Deafened & Blinded for 10 mIn; 30 HP or less = Blinded, Deafened, & Stunned for 1 Hr; 20 HP or less = killed. Celestial/Elemental/Fey/Fiend failing save is forced back to plane of origin and can't return for 24 hrs (Wish spell negates). No upcasrt bonus.

name: Draconic Transformation
desc: Gain 30 ft Blindsight, 60 ft Fly Speed, & a Breath Weapon as Bon Act in 60 ft cone, dealing 6d8 Force dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Dream of the Blue Veil
desc: Targets fall unconscious for duration & experience visions of another world on Material Plane. If spell reaches full duration, visions conclude by physically & mentally transporting targets to the seen world. To cast, you must have a magic item that originated in the desired destination world, & targets appear in a safe location w/in 1 mile of where that item was created. Alternatively, can use if a target was born on the other world, transporting targets to a safe location w/in 1 mile of where they were born. Spell ends early on a creature if they take any dmg, & that creature isn't transported. If caster is harmed, spell ends w/out transporting anyone. No upcast bonus.

name: Etherealness
desc: Enter border regions of Ethereal Plane & can only interact with Ethereal things. Upcast: +3 creatures per slot lvl.

name: Finger Of Death
desc: Deals 7d8 +30 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Humanoid killed rises as Zombie next turn under your control. No upcast bonus.

name: Fire Storm
desc: Cubes must be adjacent to another. Creatures in area take 7d10 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), & ignites unworn/uncarried flammables. No upcast bonus.

name: Forcecage
desc: Forcecage extends to ethereal plane, cannot be dispelled. Cage = ≤20 ft on side, 1/2 inch dia bars 1/2 inch apart. Box prison = 10 ft on side and solid (blocks spells & matter). Those caught in area are trapped (no save). Creatures partially inside/too large are shunted out. Teleporting/plane travel out requires Cha save or effort is wasted. No upcast bonus.

name: Mirage Arcane
desc: Terrain looks, sounds, smells, feels like other type of terrain. Can turn clear ground into difficult terrain or vice versa or impede movement. Can create/remove structures. Truesight negates. No upcast bonus.

name: Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion
desc: Conjure dwelling, floorplan up to 50 10 ftx10 ft cubes. Furnished/decorated as you choose. Food = 9 course banquet for 100 people. Staff of 100 transluscent servants serve you. Conjured items/servants cannot leave mansion. No upcast bonus.

name: Mordenkainen's Sword
desc: On cast & subsequent Bon Acts, can move sword 30 ft & melee spell atk, dealing 4d12 Force dmg. No upcast bonus.

name: Plane Shift
desc: Targets transported to another plane. You choose destination/teleportation circle. Can use spell to banish unwilling creatures to another plane. Melee spell atk, on hit, creature makes Cha save, teleported on fail.

name: Power Word Fortify
desc: Bestow 120 Temp HP, divided up among targets. No upcast bonus.

name: Power Word Pain
desc: Target w/ ≤100 HP subject to pain. Speed capped at 10 ft, disadv on atk rolls, ability checks, & saves other than Con. If target tries to cast spell, must make Con save or spell wasted. Can make Con save at end of its turn to end. No effect it target is immune to charm. No upcast bonus.

name: Prismatic Spray
desc: Creatures in blast makes Dex save, roll 1d8 for effect. Dmg halved on successful save. 1 = Red (12d6 Fire dmg), 2 = Orange (12d6 Acid dmg), 3 = Yellow (12d6 Lightning dmg), 4 = Green (12d6 Poison dmg), 5 = Blue (12d6 Cold dmg), 6 = Indigo (Restrained, Con save at end of turns. 3 fails = petrified, 3 success = free), 7 = Violet (Blinded, Wis save at start of next turn. Success = not blind, fail = transport to another plane & not blind), 8 = Struck by 2 rays (reroll 8's). No upcast bonus.

name: Project Image
desc: Copy of yourself in location you have seen. If illusion is damaged, spell ends. Act: Move illusion up to 2x your Speed & behave as you wish. Bon Act: switch from using its senses to yours or back. Physical interaction/Act to make Investigation check vs your spell save DC, reveals illusion. No upcast bonus.

name: Regenerate
desc: Target heals 4d8+15 HP. Target heals 1 HP at start of turn. Severed limbs regrown in 2 min. No upcast bonus.

name: Resurrection
desc: Target that's been dead for no more than a century returns to life w/ full HP; also removes natural poison/disease, restores body parts. Target has -4 to atks, saves, & ability checks; penalty reduced by 1 per long rest. If target has been dead for longer than a century, you can't cast spells & have disadv on d20 rolls until finish long rest. No upcast bonus.

name: Reverse Gravity
area: 50 ft rad x 100 ft tall cylinder
desc: Reverses gravity in area. Dex save to grab onto fixed object & void fall. Fall dmg possible. If reaches top of area before striking anything, hover. No upcast bonus.

name: Sequester
desc: Target becomes Invisible & can't be targeted/seen by Divination spells/effects. If creature, enters stasis & time stops for it. Can set condition for spell to end early. Condition must be w/in 1 mile. No upcast bonus.

name: Simulacrum
desc: Shape snow into duplicate of 1 Beast/Humanoid. Becomes naked creature with Acts & 1/2 HP of original. Friendly to you & designated creatures. Obeys spoken commands & acts on your turn. Lacks ability to learn/gain lvls/abilities/spell slots. Repair = 100 gp per HP. Melts at 0 HP. Can only have 1 Simulacrum at a time. No upcast bonus.

name: Symbol
desc: Ward object/10 ft dia surface. Specify trigger & effect (glyph glows for 10 min). Effects: 1) Death, deals 10d10 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg); 2) Discord, targets become incapable of communication & have disadv on atks (Wis save negates); 3) Fear, targets become Frightened for 1 min (Wis save negates) & must move at least 30 ft away from glyph each turn if able; 4) Pain, targets become Incapacitated for 1 min (Con save negates); 5) Sleep, targets become Unconscious for 10 min (Wis save negates, Act to shake awake); 6) Stunning, targets become Stunned for 1 min (Wis save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Teleport
desc:
Transport you & up to 8 willing creature w/in range, or 1 object smaller than 10 ft cube, to a selected destination. Accuracy depends on familiarity: 1) Perma Circle/Linked Object, 1-100 is on target; 2) Very Familiar, 1-5 is mishap, 6-13 is similar area, 14-24 is off target, 25-100 is on target; 3) Seen Casually, 1-33 is mishap, 34-43 is similar area, 44-53 is off target, 54-100 is on target; 4) Viewed Once/Described, 1-43 is mishap, 44-53 is similar area, 54-73 is off target, 74-100 is on target; 5) False Destination, 1-50 is mishap, 51-100 is similar area. No upcast bonus.
Mishap means each teleporting creature/object takes 3d10 Force dmg & rolls on table again. Similar area means you & group/object appear in visually/thematically similar area. Off target means you & group/object appear 2d12 miles away from destination in random direction.

name: Temple of the Gods
desc: Conjure temple w/in 120 ft cube of space dedicated to your god. You choose appearance, illumination, climate, & who can enter. 1 door entrance, altar at one end. Temple opposes creature types of your choice: Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead. Cha save to enter, -1d4 on atks, ability check, & saves inside. Divination spells can't penetrate/target in temple. Add your spellcasting ability mod to healing spells. Extends to ethereal plane. Cannot be dispelled. Can be disintegrated. Casting for 1 year = permanent. No upcast bonus.

name: Tether Essence
desc: Both targets make Con saves (w/ disadv if w/in 30 ft of other target). If either succeeds, spell ends. If both fail, creatures become linked regardless of distance & share dmg & healing. If one target is reduced to 0 HP, spell ends on both. No upcast bonus.

name: Whirlwind
area: 10 ft rad x 30 ft tall cylinder
desc: Can use Act to move 30 ft on ground. Medium or smaller unsecured objects picked up. Creatures in whirlwind take 10d6 Bludgeoning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Large or smaller creature also make Str save or become Restrained & dragged with it. At start of turns, creature moves 5 ft towards top. Restrained creature can use Act to make Str/Dex check against your spell save DC. Success = thrown 3d6 x 10 ft in random direction. No upcast bonus.

name: Abi-Dalzim's Horrid Wilting
desc: Creatures in cube take 12d8 Necrotic dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Constructs/Undead are immune. Plants & water Elementals have disadv to save. Nonmagical plants that aren't creatures wither automatically. No upcast bonus.

name: Animal Shapes
desc: Visible & willing creatures turn into Large or smaller beasts CR ≤4. Magic Act on following turns to transform affected creatures into new form. Equipment melds. Target takes beast stats. Retains alignment, Int, Wis, Cha. Can only do Acts Beast could. Targets gain Temp HP equal to HP of first form transformed into. Targets can end as Bon Act. No upcast bonus.

name: Antimagic Field
desc: Creates a sphere where magic is fully suppressed. Artifacts & spells cast by deities are unaffected. Dispel Magic & other Antimagic Fields have no effect. No upcast bonus.

name: Antipathy/Sympathy
area: Object, creature or 200 ft cube area
desc: Pick one creature type and one effect for that type: 1) Antipathy, creatures become Frightened (Wis save negates) & must flee from target, taking safest route; 2) Sympathy, creatures become Charmed (Wis save negates) approaching target as fast as possible, taking safest route & not leaving 5 ft of target, if harmed, save again. If Frightened/Charmed creature ends turn more than 120 ft away from target, can make Wis save. On save, creatures can't be affected for 1 min. No upcast bonus.

name: Befuddlement
desc: Visible creature takes 10d12 Psychic dmg, can't cast spells or take Magic Act (Int save for 1/2 dmg & no other effects). Every 30 days, target repeats save (spell also ended on Greater Restoration/Heal/Wish). No upcast bonus.

name: Clone
desc: Create inert clone of target that matures in 120 days. If original dies, soul transfers to clone. Clone is identical to original (same personality, memories, etc) but no equipment. Original remains cannot be resurrected. No upcast bonus.

name: Control Weather
desc: Must be outdoors to cast and maintain clear path to sky. You can change precipitation, temperature, & wind at once. Changes take 1d4 x 10 mins to occur. Weather changes in stages, starting from current conditions & moving up/down 1. Precipitation stages; 1 = Clear, 2 = Light clouds, 3 = Overcast/ground fog, 4 = Rain/hail/snow, & 5 = Torrential rain/driving hail/blizzard. Temperature stages; 1 = Heat wave, 2 = Hot, 3 = Warm, 4 = Cool, 5 = Cold, 6 = Freezing. Wind stages; 1 = Calm, 2 = Moderate wind, 3 = Strong wind, 4 = Gale, 5 = Storm. No upcast bonus.

name: Dark Star
desc: Sphere is filled w/ magical Darkness, area becomes difficult terrain, creatures are Deafened w/in area & Immune to Thunder dmg, no sound can pass through area, & casting spells w/ verbal components are impossible w/in area. Creatures entering area for 1st time on a turn/starting their turn there takes 8d10 Force dmg (Con save for 1/2 dmg). Any creature reduced to 0 HP by this dmg is disintegrated & all nonmagical items are reduced to dust. No upcast bonus.

name: Demiplane
desc: Create door on solid surface leading to demiplane (30 ft cube room made of wood/stone). When spell ends, door disappears & anything inside is trapped. Each time you cast, create new demiplane or connect to previous. If you know nature/contents of another casting by another creature, you can connect to it instead. No upcast bonus.

name: Dominate Monster
desc: Target becomes Charmed, adv on save if you're fighting it. Can issue telepathic commands on turn (no Act required), target follows commands to best of its ability. Can use your React for target to take React. Any dmg grants another save. Upcast: 9th (8 Hrs).

name: Earthquake
desc: Ground becomes difficult terrain, breaks caster's concen, & knocks Prone (Dex save negates). Effects: 1) Fissures, 1d6 fissures open in area in chosen locations, 1d10 x 10 ft deep & 10 ft wide, extending from edge to edge of spell area, creatures in fissure fall (Dex save to move w/ fissure edge); 2) Structures, spell deals 50 Bludgeoning dmg to structures in contact w/ ground in spell area on cast & at end of each of your turns until spell ends, collapsing structures if structure reaches 0 HP. Creatures w/in a distance equal to 1/2 structure's height take 12d6 Bludgeoning dmg, fall Prone, & are buried in rubble, escapable w/ DC 20 Athletics check as an Act (Dex save for 1/2 dmg & no other effects). No upcast bonus.

name: Feeblemind
desc: Target takes 4d6 Psychic dmg & must make Int save. Failure = their Int & Cha scores become 1. Creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate. Can identify, follow, protect friends. Every 30 days, can repeat save to end effect. Cured by Greater Restoration, Heal, or Wish. No upcast bonus.

name: Glibness
desc: When you make Cha check, you may replace base number w/ 15. Additionally, all magic shows that you are being truthful. No upcast bonus.

name: Holy Aura
desc: You & choice creatures gain adv on all saves, creatures have disadv on atk rolls against them, & atks by Fiends/Undead Blinds the atker (Con save negates). No upcast bonus.

name: Illusory Dragon
desc: Huge illusory dragon occupies space. Choose energy type: Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Necrotic/Poison. Enemies become Frightened for 1 min (Wis save negates). Can repeat save if end turn out of line of sight. Bon Act: move illusion 60 ft & make it breathe 60 ft cone for 7d6 dmg of chosen type (INT save for 1/2) during move. Illusion is tangible but atks miss, Immune to all dmg & conditions, & makes all saves. Creatures can use Study Act to examine (Investigation check vs your spell save DC) & reveal illusion. If known, has adv on breath saves. No upcast bonus.

name: Incendiary Cloud
desc: Swirling cloud in 20 ft sphere, heavily obscured, dispersed by strong wind. When appears, or when creatures enter/end turn in cloud, they takes 10d8 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Cloud moves 10 ft away from you in direction you choose at start of each of your turns. No upcast bonus.

name: Maddening Darkness
desc: Darkness in sphere blocks Darkvision, normal light, & magical light 8th lvl or lower. Shrieks, gibbering, & mad laughter inside sphere. Creature starting turn in sphere takes 8d8 Psychic dmg (Wis save for 1/2 dmg). No upcast bonus.

name: Maze
desc: Banish creature to labrynthine demiplane. Target escapes on DC 20 Investigation check (Study Act). Target reappears in space it left or nearest unoccupied. No upcast bonus.

name: Mighty Fortress
desc: Fortress 120 ft per side rises from ground. 4 turrets (20 ft a side x 30 ft tall), connected by 80 ft long walls made of 1 ft thick x 10 ft wide x 20 ft tall panels. Up to 4 doors in outer wall. A small keep inside (50 ft a side x 10 ft tall each, divided into rooms of your choice). Food to serve 9-course meal to 100 people per day. 100 invisible servants to work inside. Each 10 ft section has AC 15, 30 HP per inch of thickness. After 7 days, fortess crumbles safely. Casting same place for a year every 7 days makes fortress permanent. No upcast bonus.

name: Mind Blank
desc: Target becomes Immune to Psychic dmg, effects that would sense emotions/read thoughts, Charm it & Divination spells. Even foils Wish or similar powers that attempt to affect target's mind/gain information about target. No upcast bonus.

name: Power Word Stun
desc: Stuns creature w/ ≤150hp. Con save at end of each turn to end condition. No upcast bonus.

name: Reality Break
desc: Target can't take Reacts & an effect happens to it at the start of each of its turns (Wis save on cast & at end of each turn negates/ends spell). Effects: 1-2) Vision of the Far Realm, target takes 6d12 Psychic dmg & is Stunned until end of turn; 3-5) Rending Rift, target takes 8d12 Force dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg); 6-8) Wormhole, target is teleported 30 ft to visible unoccupied space of your choice, takes 10d12 Force dmg, & is knocked Prone; 9-10) Chill of the Dark Void, target takes 10d12 Cold dmg & is Blinded until end of turn. No upcast bonus.

name: Sunburst
desc: Each creature in area takes 12d6 Radiant dmg & is Blinded for 1 min (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no blind). Blinded creatures make save at end of each turn to remove the effect. Dispels any magical Darkness in area. No upcast bonus.

name: Telepathy
desc: Create telepathic link to willing creature on same plane you are familiar with. Can communicate seamlessly with target using images/sounds/words/other sensory messages. Target recognizes you. Spell ends if you/target aren't on same plane. No upcast bonus.

name: Tsunami
area: 300 ft long x 300 ft tall x 50 ft thick wave
desc: Wave deals 6d10 Bludgeoning dmg (Str save for 1/2 dmg) to creatures in area. Moves away from you 50 ft at start of your turn, dealing 5d10 Bludgeoning dmg to Huge or smaller creatures failing Str save. At end of turn, wall loses 50 ft height & dmg reduced by 1d10. Spell ends when wave is 0 ft high. Caught creatures cannot move except by swimming (Athletics check vs your spell save DC). No upcast bonus.

name: Astral Projection
desc: Targets are projected to the Astral Plane via a silver cord, appearing in an astral form w/ all statistics & possessions, as well as a silvery cord trailing into nothingness. Their material body is in stasis until the soul returns (Unconscious, doesn't need food/water, doesn't age). If the astral form leaves the Astral Plane, target's body & possessions travel along silver cord, causing target to re-enter their body on the new plane. If the astral form drops to 0 HP, spell ends for target. The cord isn't cut unless an effect specifies that it does so, but if it is, that target's body & astral form die. You can also take Magic Act to end spell for all targets. When spell ends, living targets reappear in their bodies & exit stasis.

name: Blade of Disaster
desc: Upon casting & subsequent Bon Acts, move blade 30 ft to unoccupied space & make 2 melee spell atks against creature/object/structure w/in 5 ft, dealing 4d12 Force dmg on hit. Blade crits on 18+, dealing a total of 12d12 Force dmg. Blade can pass harmlessly through any barrier, including Walls of Force.

name: Foresight
desc: Target gains adv on all d20 rolls & others have disadv on atk rolls against target. Spell ends if you cast it again.

name: Gate
desc: Create circular portal linking to precise location on another plane. Dieties & other planar rulers can prevent portals from opening. Can speak true name of specific creature when casting to instead create Gate that summons it. It acts freely upon arrival.

name: Imprisonment
desc: Binds creature in stasis, they don't need to eat/sleep/drink & don't age (Wis save negates & protects for 24 hrs). Divination spells can't locate or percieve the target. Target can't teleport, & is affected by an effect of your choice: 1) Burial, target is entombed beneath the earth in hollow globe of magical force just large enough to contain them, nothing can pass into/out of globe; 2) Chaining, target is Restrained & can't be moved by any means; 3) Hedged Prison, target is trapped in demiplane (of your design) warded against teleportation & planar travel; 4) Minimus Containment, target becomes 1 inch tall & is trapped inside indestructible gemstone/similar object, they can see out & be seen w/in, but nothing else can pass through; 5) Slumber, target is Unconscious & can't wake. Must specify trigger to end spell when casting it, as simple/elaborate as you desire, but DM must agree that it has a high likelihood of happening w/in the next decade. Dispel Magic can end spell if cast at lvl 9, targeting prison/material component.

name: Invulnerability
desc: You gain Immunity to all dmg until spell ends.

name: Mass Heal
desc: Restore up to 700 HP divided among targets w/in range. Heals Blinded, Deafened, & Poisoned conditions.

name: Mass Polymorph
desc: Targets assume Beast form of your choice (Wis save negates, shapechangers auto-succeed) w/ a CR = or less than target CR (or 1/2 target lvl). Game stats replaced by Beast, & targets gain Temp HP equal to HP of new form. Limited in Acts by form. Can't speak, cast spells, or do anything requiring hands/speech. Gear melds into new form. Can't activate, use, wield equipment.

name: Meteor Swarm
desc: Creatures in areas take 20d6 Fire dmg & 20d6 Bludgeoning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg). Blast dmg don't stack. Nonmagical uncarried/unworn objects also take dmg. Ignites combustibles.

name: Power Word Heal
desc: Visible target regains all HP. Charmed/Frightened/Paralyzed/Poisoned/Stunned conditions end on target. If target is Prone, can use its React to stand up.

name: Power Word Kill
desc: Kills target w/ ≤100 hp. Otherwise, target takes 12d12 Psychic dmg.

name: Prismatic Wall
area: 90 ft long x 30 ft tall x 1 inch thick wall or 30 ft dia globe
desc: Create opaque wall, sheds 100 ft bright light & 100 ft dim light. Placing it on a creature causes spell to fail. You & designated creatures can pass through unharmed. Others moving w/in 20/ of it/starting turn there are Blinded (Con save negates). Wall has 7 layers & must be passed one at a time, each forcing a Dex save. Layers: 1) Red, deals 12d6 Fire dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), nonmagical ranged atks can't pass through, destroyed if it takes ≤25 Cold dmg; 2) Orange, deals 12d6 Acid dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), magical ranged atks can't pass through, destroyed by a strong wind; 3) Yellow, deals 12d6 Lightning dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), destroyed if it takes ≤60 Force dmg; 4) Green, deals 12d6 Poison dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), destroyed by spells that can open portals on solid surface of 5th lvl or higher; 5) Blue, deals 12d6 Cold dmg (Dex save for 1/2 dmg), destroyed if it takes ≤25 Fire dmg; 6) Indigo, target is Restrained & makes Con save at end of each of its turns (3 successes = condition ends, 3 fails = Petrified until freed by Greater Restoration or similar), spells can't be cast through, destroyed by Daylight; 7) Violet, target is Blinded & makes Wis save at start of your next turn (success = condition ends, fail = condition ends & target is teleported to another plane of your choice [DM's choice]), destroyed by Dispel Magic. Wall has AC 10 & layers can only be destroyed in order. Antimagic Field has no effect.

name: Psychic Scream
desc: Targets w/ Int score lower than 2 immune. Targets take 14d6 Psychic dmg & are Stunned (Int save for 1/2 dmg & no Stun). If target is killed by this dmg, head explodes. Stunned can make Int save at end of its turn to end effect.

name: Ravenous Void
desc: Created sphere & w/in 100 ft are difficult terrain. Nonmagical uncarried/unworn objects fully inside sphere are destroyed. When sphere appears & at start of each of your turns, unsecured objects w/in 100 ft are pulled toward sphere's center. Creatures starting its turn w/in 100 ft of sphere is also pulled to sphere's center by most direct route (Str save negates), taking 5d10 Force dmg & becoming Restrained when entering sphere. Restrained creature can make Str check as Act vs your spell save DC to end Restrain on itself or another. Any creature reduced to 0 HP by this spell is annihilated along with all nonmagical items carried/worn.

name: Shapechange
desc: Assume form of new creature CR = or lower than your lvl. Creature can't be Construct/Undead. Assume standard version of creature. Replace stats except mental scores, skills, & save proficiencies. Gain proficiencies of form. Gain Temp HP equal to HP of first form. Upon shapeshifting, determine whether equipment drops to ground or changes in size/shape to fit new form.

name: Storm of Vengeance
desc: Storm affects creatures below, deals 2d6 Thunder dmg & Deafening (Con save negates). Round 2 = 4d6 Acid dmg. Round 3 = 6 lightning bolts strike targets you choose, dealing 10d6 Lightning dmg (Dex save 1/2 dmg). Round 4 = 2d6 Bludgeoning dmg from hail. Round 5-10 = difficult terrain, heavily obscured, 1d6 Cold dmg, ranged atks impossible, strong wind blows through area.

name: Time Ravage
desc: Rapidly age target (Con save for 1/2 dmg & no other effect), dealing 10d12 Necrotic dmg & aging them until they have 30 days to live. In this state, target has disadv on atks, ability checks, & saves, & its Speed is halved. Only Wish or Greater Restoration cast at 9th lvl can restore target.

name: Time Stop
desc: Stop time for everyone but yourself. You take 1d4+1 turns in a row. Effect ends if any Act you make affects another creature, or if you move to outside 1000 ft of cast location.

name: True Polymorph
desc: Transform target into different creature/object (Wis save negates, shapeshifters auto-succeed). If you maintain concen throughout duration, spell becomes permanent until dispelled. Creature into Creature: New form can't be higher CR, all stats replaced except HP, Hit Die, alignment, & personality, gains Temp HP equal to HP of new form, acts limited by new form, can't speak/cast spells, equipment melds. Object into Creature: New form must be CR 9 or lower, creature is friendly to you & allies & takes turns immediately after you in combat, obeying your commands, after duration you lose control of creature. Creature into Object: All worn/carried items transformed as well, & creature has no memory of time spent as object.

name: True Resurrection
desc: Restore target that's been dead no longer than 200 years to life w/ full HP. Closes all wounds, neutralizes any poisons, cures all magical contagions, even restores missing organs/limbs. Undead creatures restored to non-Undead form. This spell can even provide a new body, appearing w/in 10 ft of you.

name: Weird
desc: Create illusory terrors in targets' minds, they take 10d10 Psychic dmg & become Frightened (Wis save for 1/2 dmg & no fright). At end of each frightened creatures turn, they take 5d10 Psychic dmg & can make a new Wis save to end spell.

name: Wish
desc:
Alter reality itself. Basic use is to duplicate any spell of 8th lvl or lower, upcast to 9th lvl. No components/extra casting time needed. Alternative effects: 1) Object Creation, create nonmagical item up to 25000 gp in value w/in 300 ft on the ground; 2) Instant Health, you & ≤20 creatures regain all HP & end all effects listed in Greater Restoration spell; 3) Resistance, ≤10 creatures gain Resistance to one dmg type permanently; 4) Spell Immunity, ≤10 creatures become Immune to a single spell/magical effect for 8 hrs; 5) Sudden Learning, swap one of your Feats w/ another of which you're eligible; 6) Roll Redo, force a reroll of any roll made w/in last round (including your last turn), & reality reshapes itself to accommodate new result, you also choose if the reroll is made w/ adv or disadv, & you choose to use new roll or old roll; 7) Reshape Reality, you may Wish for something not included in any other effect, simply state Wish to DM as precisely as possible, the greater the Wish, the greater the likelihood that something goes wrong or the spell simply fails.
Producing any other effect than duplicating an 8th lvl spell or lower weakens you. Each time you cast another spell until finishing a Long Rest, take 1d10 Necrotic dmg per lvl of that spell, dmg can't be reduced/prevented in any way. Also, your Str score becomes 3 for 2d4 days (each day spent resting & nothing more than light activity reduces recovery time by 2 days). Finally, there's a 33% chance that you're unable to cast Wish ever again if you suffer this stress.
